items.abstract_zh: 现代 GPU 架构具有多个着色器核心和一个在它们之间分配工作（线程）的调度程序，重点关注负载平衡。这些负载平衡技术有利于线程分布，这对 L1 纹理缓存中的图形应用程序的纹理内存局部性有害。 Texture memory accesses make up the majority of the traffic to the memory hierarchy in typical low power graphics architectures.本文重点关注新的工作负载调度程序，通过探索对线程进行分组、将组分配给着色器核心以及在不违反管道正确性的情况下对线程重新排序的各种方法来改进 L1 纹理缓存局部性。为了克服由此产生的负载不平衡，我们还建议对 GPU 架构进行细微修改，以帮助将缓存局部性的改进转化为 GPU 性能的改进。我们提出了包含这些想法的 DTexL，并通过十个商业游戏的基准套件对其进行评估，以获得 L2 访问减少 46.8%、性能提高 19.3% 以及总 GPU 能量降低 6.3% 的结果。所有这一切的开销都可以忽略不计。

items.title: SIMR: Single Instruction Multiple Request Processing for Energy-Efficient Data Center Microservices.
items.abstract: Contemporary data center servers process thousands of similar, independent requests per minute. In the interest of programmer productivity and ease of scaling, workloads in data centers have shifted from single monolithic processes toward a micro and nanoservice software architecture. As a result, single servers are now packed with many threads executing the same, relatively small task on different data.State-of-the-art data centers run these microservices on multi-core CPUs. However, the flexibility offered by traditional CPUs comes at an energy-efficiency cost. The Multiple Instruction Multiple Data execution model misses opportunities to aggregate the similarity in contemporary microservices. We observe that the Single Instruction Multiple Thread execution model, employed by GPUs, provides better thread scaling and has the potential to reduce frontend and memory system energy consumption. However, contemporary GPUs are ill-suited for the latency-sensitive microservice space.To exploit the similarity in contemporary microservices, while maintaining acceptable latency, we propose the Request Processing Unit (RPU). The RPU combines elements of out-of-order CPUs with lockstep thread aggregation mechanisms found in GPUs to execute microservices in a Single Instruction Multiple Request (SIMR) fashion. To complement the RPU, we also propose a SIMR-aware software stack that uses novel mechanisms to batch requests based on their predicted control-flow, split batches based on predicted latency divergence and map per-request memory allocations to maximize coalescing opportunities. Our resulting RPU system processes 5. 7 × more requests/joule than multi-core CPUs, while increasing single thread latency by only 1. ×.
items.abstract_zh: Contemporary data center servers process thousands of similar, independent requests per minute.为了提高程序员的工作效率和易于扩展，数据中心的工作负载已从单一的整体流程转向微服务和纳米服务软件架构。因此，单个服务器现在挤满了许多线程，在不同的数据上执行相同的、相对较小的任务。最先进的数据中心在多核 CPU 上运行这些微服务。 However, the flexibility offered by traditional CPUs comes at an energy-efficiency cost. The Multiple Instruction Multiple Data execution model misses opportunities to aggregate the similarity in contemporary microservices.我们观察到 GPU 采用的单指令多线程执行模型提供了更好的线程扩展，并且有可能降低前端和内存系统的能耗。然而，当代 GPU 不适合延迟敏感的微服务空间。为了利用当代微服务的相似性，同时保持可接受的延迟，我们提出了请求处理单元（RPU）。 RPU 将无序 CPU 的元素与 GPU 中的锁步线程聚合机制相结合，以单指令多请求 (SIMR) 方式执行微服务。为了补充 RPU，我们还提出了一个 SIMR 感知软件堆栈，该堆栈使用新颖的机制根据预测的控制流对请求进行批处理，根据预测的延迟差异进行分批，并映射每个请求的内存分配以最大化合并机会。 Our resulting RPU system processes 5. 7 × more requests/joule than multi-core CPUs, while increasing single thread latency by only 1. ×.

items.title: Whisper: Profile-Guided Branch Misprediction Elimination for Data Center Applications.
items.abstract: Modern data center applications experience frequent branch mispredictions– degrading performance, increasing cost, and reducing energy efficiency in data centers. Even the state-of the-art branch predictor, TAGE-SC-L, suffers from an average branch Mispredictions Per Kilo Instructions (branch-MPKI) of 3.0 (0.5-7.2) for these applications since their large code footprints exhaust TAGE-SC-L’s intended capacity. In this work, we propose Whisper, a novel profile-guided mechanism to avoid branch mispredictions. Whisper investigates the in-production profile of data center applications to identify precise program contexts that lead to branch mispredictions. Corresponding prediction hints are then inserted into code to strategically avoid those mispredictions during program execution. Whisper presents three novel profile-guided techniques: (1) hashed history correlation which efficiently encodes hard-to-predict correlations in branch history using lightweight Boolean formulas, (2) randomized formula testing which selects a locally-optimal Boolean formula from a randomly selected subset of possible formulas to predict a branch, and (3) the extension of Read-Once Monotone Boolean Formulas with Implication and Converse Non-Implication to improve the branch history coverage of these formulas with minimal overhead. We evaluate Whisper on 12 widely-used data center applications and demonstrate that Whisper enables traditional branch predictors to achieve a speedup close to that of an ideal branch predictor. Specifically, Whisper achieves an average speedup of 2.8% (0.4%-4.6%) by reducing 16.8% (1.7%-32.4%) of branch mispredictions over TAGE-SC-L and outperforms the state-of the-art profile-guided branch prediction mechanisms by 7.9% on average.
items.abstract_zh: 现代数据中心应用程序经常遇到分支错误预测，从而降低数据中心的性能、增加成本并降低能源效率。即使是最先进的分支预测器 TAGE-SC-L，对于这些应用程序来说，每公斤指令的平均分支错误预测 (branch-MPKI) 也为 3.0 (0.5-7.2)，因为它们的代码占用量很大，耗尽了 TAGE-SC-L 的预期容量。 In this work, we propose Whisper, a novel profile-guided mechanism to avoid branch mispredictions. Whisper 调查数据中心应用程序的生产概况，以识别导致分支错误预测的精确程序上下文。 Corresponding prediction hints are then inserted into code to strategically avoid those mispredictions during program execution. Whisper 提出了三种新颖的配置引导技术：(1) 哈希历史相关性，使用轻量级布尔公式有效地编码分支历史中难以预测的相关性；(2) 随机公式测试，从随机选择的可能公式子集中选择局部最优布尔公式来预测分支；(3) 扩展具有蕴涵和逆非蕴涵的一次性读取单调布尔公式，以最小的开销提高这些公式的分支历史覆盖率。我们在 12 个广泛使用的数据中心应用程序上评估 Whisper，并证明 Whisper 使传统分支预测器能够实现接近理想分支预测器的加速。具体来说，Whisper 比 TAGE-SC-L 减少了 16.8% (1.7%-32.4%) 的分支错误预测，平均加速了 2.8% (0.4%-4.6%)，并且比最先进的配置文件引导分支预测机制平均提高了 7.9%。

items.title: Networked SSD: Flash Memory Interconnection Network for High-Bandwidth SSD.
items.abstract: As the flash memory performance increases with more bandwidth, the flash memory channel or the interconnect is becoming a bigger bottleneck to enable high performance SSD system. However, the bandwidth of the flash memory interconnect is not increasing at the same rate as the flash memory. In addition, current flash memory bus is based on dedicated signaling where separate control signals are used for communication between the flash channel controller and the flash memory chip. In this work, we propose to exploit packetized communication to improve the effective flash memory interconnect bandwidth and propose packetized SSD (pSSD) system architecture. We first show how packetized communication can be exploited and the microarchitectural changes required. We then propose the Omnibus topology for flash memory interconnect to enable a packetized network SSD (pnSSD) among the flash memory – a 2D bus-based organization that maintains a “bus” organization for the interconnect while enabling direct communication between the flash memory chips. The pnSSD architecture enables a new type of garbage collection that we refer to as spatial garbage collection that significantly reduces the interference between I/O requests and garbage collection. Our detailed evaluation of pnSSD shows 82% improvement in I/O latency with no garbage collection (GC) while improving I/O latency by 9.71× when GC occurs in parallel with I/O operation, through spatial garbage collection.
items.abstract_zh: 随着闪存性能随着带宽的增加而提高，闪存通道或互连正在成为实现高性能 SSD 系统的更大瓶颈。 However, the bandwidth of the flash memory interconnect is not increasing at the same rate as the flash memory.此外，当前的闪存总线基于专用信令，其中单独的控制信号用于闪存通道控制器和闪存芯片之间的通信。在这项工作中，我们建议利用分组通信来提高有效闪存互连带宽，并提出分组 SSD (pSSD) 系统架构。 We first show how packetized communication can be exploited and the microarchitectural changes required.然后，我们提出了用于闪存互连的综合总线拓扑，以在闪存之间启用分组网络SSD（pnSSD）——一种基于2D总线的组织，它维护互连的“总线”组织，同时实现闪存芯片之间的直接通信。 pnSSD 架构支持一种新型垃圾收集，我们将其称为空间垃圾收集，可显着减少 I/O 请求和垃圾收集之间的干扰。我们对 pnSSD 的详细评估显示，在没有垃圾收集 (GC) 的情况下，I/O 延迟提高了 82%，而通过空间垃圾收集，当 GC 与 I/O 操作并行发生时，I/O 延迟提高了 9.71 倍。

items.title: ARK: Fully Homomorphic Encryption Accelerator with Runtime Data Generation and Inter-Operation Key Reuse.
items.abstract: Homomorphic Encryption (HE) is one of the most promising post-quantum cryptographic schemes that enable privacy-preserving computation on servers. However, noise accumulates as we perform operations on HE-encrypted data, restricting the number of possible operations. Fully HE (FHE) removes this restriction by introducing the bootstrapping operation, which refreshes the data; however, FHE schemes are highly memory-bound. Bootstrapping, in particular, requires loading GBs of evaluation keys and plaintexts from offchip memory, which makes FHE acceleration fundamentally bottlenecked by the off-chip memory bandwidth.In this paper, we propose ARK, an Accelerator for FHE with Runtime data generation and inter-operation Key reuse. ARK enables practical FHE workloads with a novel algorithm-architecture co-design to accelerate bootstrapping. We first eliminate the off-chip memory bandwidth bottleneck through runtime data generation and inter-operation key reuse. This approach enables ARK to fully exploit on-chip memory by substantially reducing the size of the working set. On top of such algorithmic enhancements, we build ARK microarchitecture that minimizes on-chip data movement through an efficient, alternating data distribution policy based on the data access patterns and a streamlined dataflow organization of the tailored functional units – including base conversion, number-theoretic transform, and automorphism units. Overall, our codesign effectively handles the heavy computation and data movement overheads of FHE, drastically reducing the cost of HE operations, including bootstrapping.
items.abstract_zh: 同态加密 (HE) 是最有前途的后量子加密方案之一，可在服务器上实现隐私保护计算。然而，当我们对 HE 加密数据执行操作时，噪声会累积，从而限制了可能操作的数量。完全HE（FHE）通过引入刷新数据的引导操作来消除此限制；然而，FHE 方案高度受内存限制。特别是引导程序，需要从片外存储器加载 GB 的评估密钥和明文，这使得 FHE 加速从根本上成为片外存储器带宽的瓶颈。在本文中，我们提出了 ARK，一种具有运行时数据生成和互操作密钥重用的 FHE 加速器。 ARK 通过新颖的算法架构协同设计来加速引导，从而实现实用的 FHE 工作负载。我们首先通过运行时数据生成和互操作密钥重用来消除片外内存带宽瓶颈。这种方法使 ARK 能够通过大幅减小工作集的大小来充分利用片上内存。除了这些算法增强之外，我们还构建了 ARK 微架构，通过基于数据访问模式的高效交替数据分配策略和定制功能单元（包括基数转换、数论变换和自同构单元）的简化数据流组织，最大限度地减少片上数据移动。总的来说，我们的协同设计有效地处理了 FHE 的繁重计算和数据移动开销，大大降低了 HE 操作的成本，包括引导成本。

items.title: Automatic Domain-Specific SoC Design for Autonomous Unmanned Aerial Vehicles.
items.abstract: Building domain-specific accelerators is becoming increasingly paramount to meet the high-performance requirements under stringent power and real-time constraints. However, emerging application domains like autonomous vehicles are complex systems with constraints extending beyond the computing stack. Manually selecting and navigating the design space to design custom and efficient domain-specific SoCs (DSSoC) is tedious and expensive. Hence, there is a need for automated DSSoC design methodologies. In this paper, we use agile and autonomous UAVs as a case study to understand how to automate domain-specific SoCs design for autonomous vehicles. Architecting a UAV DSSoC requires consideration of parameters such as sensor rate, compute throughput, and other physical characteristics (e.g., payload weight, thrust-to-weight ratio) that affect overall performance. Iterating over several component choices results in a combinatorial explosion of the number of possible combinations: from tens of thousands to billions, depending on implementation details. To navigate the DSSoC design space efficiently, we introduce AutoPilot, a systematic methodology for automatically designing DSSoC for autonomous UAVs. AutoPilot uses machine learning to navigate the large DSSoC design space and automatically select a combination of autonomy algorithm and hardware accelerator while considering the cross-product effect across different UAV components. AutoPilot consistently outperforms general-purpose hardware selections like Xavier NX and Jetson TX2, as well as dedicated hardware accelerators built for autonomous UAVs. DSSoC designs generated by AutoPilot increase the number of missions on average by up to 2.25×, 1.62×, and 1.43× for nano, micro, and mini-UAVs, respectively, over baselines. Further, we discuss the potential application of AutoPilot methodology to other related autonomous vehicles.
items.abstract_zh: 为了满足严格的功耗和实时限制下的高性能要求，构建特定领域的加速器变得越来越重要。然而，自动驾驶汽车等新兴应用领域是复杂的系统，其限制超出了计算堆栈的范围。手动选择和导航设计空间来设计定制且高效的特定领域 SoC (DSSoC) 既繁琐又昂贵。因此，需要自动化 DSSoC 设计方法。在本文中，我们使用敏捷和自主无人机作为案例研究，以了解如何自动化自动驾驶车辆的特定领域 SoC 设计。构建无人机 DSSoC 需要考虑影响整体性能的参数，例如传感器速率、计算吞吐量和其他物理特性（例如有效载荷重量、推重比）。迭代多个组件选择会导致可能组合数量的组合爆炸：从数万到数十亿，具体取决于实现细节。为了有效地驾驭 DSSoC 设计空间，我们引入了 AutoPilot，这是一种自动设计自主无人机 DSSoC 的系统方法。 AutoPilot 使用机器学习来导航大型 DSSoC 设计空间，并自动选择自主算法和硬件加速器的组合，同时考虑不同无人机组件的跨产品效应。 AutoPilot 的性能始终优于 Xavier NX 和 Jetson TX2 等通用硬件选择，以及专为自主无人机打造的专用硬件加速器。 AutoPilot 生成的 DSSoC 设计使纳米、微型和迷你无人机的平均任务数量分别比基准增加了 2.25 倍、1.62 倍和 1.43 倍。此外，我们还讨论了 AutoPilot 方法在其他相关自动驾驶车辆中的潜在应用。

items.title: Datamime: Generating Representative Benchmarks by Automatically Synthesizing Datasets.
items.abstract: Benchmarks that closely match the behavior of production workloads are crucial to design and provision computer systems. However, current approaches fall short: First, open-source benchmarks use public datasets that cause different behavior from production workloads. Second, blackbox workload cloning techniques generate synthetic code that imitates the target workload, but the resulting program fails to capture most workload characteristics, such as microarchitectural bottlenecks or time-varying behavior.Generating code that mimics a complex application is an extremely hard problem. Instead, we propose a different and easier approach to benchmark synthesis. Our key insight is that, for many production workloads, the program is publicly available or there is a reasonably similar open-source program. In this case, generating the right dataset is sufficient to produce an accurate benchmark.Based on this observation, we present Datamime, a profile-guided approach to generate representative benchmarks for production workloads. Datamime uses the performance profiles of a target workload to generate a dataset that, when used by a benchmark program, behaves very similarly to the target workload in terms of its microarchitectural characteristics.We evaluate Datamime on several datacenter workloads. Datamime generates synthetic benchmarks that closely match the microarchitectural features of these workloads, with a mean absolute percentage error of 3.2% on IPC. Microarchitectural behavior stays close across processor types. Finally, time-varying behaviors are also replicated, making these benchmarks useful to e.g. characterize and optimize tail latency.
items.abstract_zh: 与生产工作负载行为密切匹配的基准对于设计和配置计算机系统至关重要。然而，当前的方法存在缺陷：首先，开源基准测试使用公共数据集，这会导致与生产工作负载不同的行为。其次，黑盒工作负载克隆技术生成模仿目标工作负载的合成代码，但生成的程序无法捕获大多数工作负载特征，例如微架构瓶颈或时变行为。生成模仿复杂应用程序的代码是一个极其困难的问题。相反，我们提出了一种不同且更简单的基准综合方法。我们的主要见解是，对于许多生产工作负载，该程序是公开可用的或存在相当相似的开源程序。在这种情况下，生成正确的数据集足以生成准确的基准。根据这一观察，我们提出了 Datamime，这是一种配置文件引导的方法，用于为生产工作负载生成代表性基准。 Datamime 使用目标工作负载的性能配置文件来生成数据集，当基准程序使用该数据集时，该数据集的微架构特征与目标工作负载的行为非常相似。我们在多个数据中心工作负载上评估 Datamime。 Datamime 生成与这些工作负载的微架构特征紧密匹配的综合基准，IPC 上的平均绝对百分比错误为 3.2%。不同处理器类型的微架构行为保持接近。最后，随时间变化的行为也被复制，使得这些基准对于例如表征并优化尾部延迟。

items.title: 3D-FPIM: An Extreme Energy-Efficient DNN Acceleration System Using 3D NAND Flash-Based In-Situ PIM Unit.
items.abstract: The crossbar structure of the nonvolatile memory enables highly parallel and energy-efficient analog matrix-vector-multiply (MVM) operations. To exploit its efficiency, existing works design a mixed-signal deep neural network (DNN) accelerator, which offloads low-precision MVM operations to the memory array. However, they fail to accurately and efficiently support the low-precision networks due to their naive ADC designs. In addition, they cannot be applied to the latest technology nodes due to their premature RRAM-based memory array.In this work, we present 3D-FPIM, an energy-efficient and robust mixed-signal DNN acceleration system. 3D-FPIM is a full-stack 3D NAND flash-based architecture to accurately deploy low-precision networks. We design the hardware stack by carefully architecting a specialized analog-to-digital conversion method and utilizing the three-dimensional structure to achieve high accuracy, energy efficiency, and robustness. To accurately and efficiently deploy the networks, we provide a DNN retraining framework and a customized compiler. For evaluation, we implement an industry-validated circuit-level simulator. The result shows that 3D-FPIM achieves an average of 2.09x higher performance per area and 13.18x higher energy efficiency compared to the baseline 2D RRAM-based accelerator.
items.abstract_zh: 非易失性存储器的交叉结构可实现高度并行且节能的模拟矩阵向量乘法 (MVM) 操作。为了利用其效率，现有的工作设计了一种混合信号深度神经网络 (DNN) 加速器，它将低精度 MVM 操作卸载到内存阵列。然而，由于其简单的 ADC 设计，它们无法准确有效地支持低精度网络。此外，由于其基于 RRAM 的存储器阵列还不成熟，因此无法应用于最新的技术节点。 在这项工作中，我们提出了 3D-FPIM，一种节能且鲁棒的混合信号 DNN 加速系统。 3D-FPIM是基于全栈3D NAND闪存的架构，可准确部署低精度网络。我们通过精心构建专门的模数转换方法并利用三维结构来设计硬件堆栈，以实现高精度、高能效和鲁棒性。为了准确高效地部署网络，我们提供了 DNN 再训练框架和定制编译器。为了进行评估，我们实施了经过行业验证的电路级模拟器。结果表明，与基于 2D RRAM 的基准加速器相比，3D-FPIM 的单位面积性能平均提高了 2.09 倍，能效提高了 13.18 倍。

items.title: Ristretto: An Atomized Processing Architecture for Sparsity-Condensed Stream Flow in CNN.
items.abstract: Low-precision quantization and sparsity have been widely explored in CNN acceleration due to their effectiveness in reducing computational complexity and memory requirements. However, to support variable numerical precision and sparse computation, prior accelerators design flexible multipliers or sparse dataflow separately. A uniform solution that simultaneously exploits mixed-precision and dual-sided irregular sparsity for CNN acceleration is still lacking. Through an in-depth review of existing precision-scalable and sparse accelerators, we observe that a direct combination of low-level multipliers and high-level sparse dataflow from both sides is challenging due to their orthogonal design spaces. To this end, in this paper, we propose condensed streaming computation. By representing non-zero weights and activations as atomized streams, the low-level mixed-precision multiplication and high-level sparse convolution can be unified into a shared dataflow through hierarchical data reuse. Based on the condensed streaming computation, we propose Ristretto, an atomized architecture that exploits both mixed-precision and dual-sided irregular sparsity for CNN inference. We implement Ristretto in a 28nm technology node. Extensive evaluations show that Ristretto consistently outperforms three state-of-the-art CNN accelerators, including Bit Fusion, Laconic, and SparTen, in terms of performance and energy efficiency.
items.abstract_zh: 低精度量化和稀疏性因其在降低计算复杂性和内存需求方面的有效性而在 CNN 加速中得到了广泛的探索。然而，为了支持可变数值精度和稀疏计算，现有加速器单独设计灵活的乘法器或稀疏数据流。 A uniform solution that simultaneously exploits mixed-precision and dual-sided irregular sparsity for CNN acceleration is still lacking.通过对现有的精度可扩展和稀疏加速器的深入审查，我们观察到，由于其正交设计空间，将双方的低级乘法器和高级稀疏数据流直接结合起来具有挑战性。 To this end, in this paper, we propose condensed streaming computation.通过将非零权重和激活表示为原子化流，可以通过分层数据重用将低级混合精度乘法和高级稀疏卷积统一为共享数据流。基于压缩流计算，我们提出了 Ristretto，一种原子化架构，利用混合精度和双面不规则稀疏性进行 CNN 推理。 We implement Ristretto in a 28nm technology node.广泛的评估表明，Ristretto 在性能和能源效率方面始终优于三种最先进的 CNN 加速器，包括 Bit Fusion、Laconic 和 SparTen。

items.title: Let Each Quantum Bit Choose Its Basis Gates.
items.abstract: Near-term quantum computers are primarily limited by errors in quantum operations (or gates) between two quantum bits (or qubits). A physical machine typically provides a set of basis gates that include primitive 2-qubit (2Q) and 1-qubit (1Q) gates that can be implemented in a given technology. 2Q entangling gates, coupled with some 1Q gates, allow for universal quantum computation. In superconducting technologies, the current state of the art is to implement the same 2Q gate between every pair of qubits (typically an XX-or XY-type gate). This strict hardware uniformity requirement for 2Q gates in a large quantum computer has made scaling up a time and resource-intensive endeavor in the lab. We propose a radical idea – allow the 2Q basis gate(s) to differ between every pair of qubits, selecting the best entangling gates that can be calibrated between given pairs of qubits. This work aims to give quantum scientists the ability to run meaningful algorithms with qubit systems that are not perfectly uniform. Scientists will also be able to use a much broader variety of novel 2Q gates for quantum computing. We develop a theoretical framework for identifying good 2Q basis gates on “nonstandard” Cartan trajectories that deviate from “standard” trajectories like XX. We then introduce practical methods for calibration and compilation with nonstandard 2Q gates, and discuss possible ways to improve the compilation. To demonstrate our methods in a case study, we simulated both standard XY-type trajectories and faster, nonstandard trajectories using an entangling gate architecture with far-detuned transmon qubits. We identify efficient 2Q basis gates on these nonstandard trajectories and use them to compile a number of standard benchmark circuits such as QFT and QAOA. Our results demonstrate an 8x improvement over the baseline 2Q gates with respect to speed and coherence-limited gate fidelity.
items.abstract_zh: Near-term quantum computers are primarily limited by errors in quantum operations (or gates) between two quantum bits (or qubits).物理机通常提供一组基础门，其中包括可以在给定技术中实现的原始 2 量子位 (2Q) 和 1 量子位 (1Q) 门。 2Q entangling gates, coupled with some 1Q gates, allow for universal quantum computation.在超导技术中，当前的技术水平是在每对量子位之间实现相同的 2Q 门（通常是 XX 或 XY 型门）。大型量子计算机中 2Q 门的严格硬件一致性要求使得实验室中的扩展成为一项时间和资源密集型的工作。我们提出了一个激进的想法——允许每对量子位之间的 2Q 基础门不同，选择可以在给定的量子位对之间校准的最佳纠缠门。 This work aims to give quantum scientists the ability to run meaningful algorithms with qubit systems that are not perfectly uniform. Scientists will also be able to use a much broader variety of novel 2Q gates for quantum computing.我们开发了一个理论框架，用于识别偏离“标准”轨迹（如 XX）的“非标准”嘉当轨迹上良好的 2Q 基门。然后，我们介绍使用非标准 2Q 门进行校准和编译的实用方法，并讨论改进编译的可能方法。为了在案例研究中展示我们的方法，我们使用具有远失谐传输量子位的纠缠门架构模拟了标准 XY 型轨迹和更快的非标准轨迹。我们在这些非标准轨迹上识别出有效的 2Q 基础门，并使用它们来编译许多标准基准电路，例如 QFT 和 QAOA。 Our results demonstrate an 8x improvement over the baseline 2Q gates with respect to speed and coherence-limited gate fidelity.

items.title: OverGen: Improving FPGA Usability through Domain-specific Overlay Generation.
items.abstract: FPGAs have been proven to be powerful computational accelerators across many types of workloads. The mainstream programming approach is high level synthesis (HLS), which maps high-level languages (e.g. C+ #pragmas) to hardware. Unfortunately, HLS leaves a significant programmability gap in terms of reconfigurability, customization and versatility: Although HLS compilation is fast, the downstream physical design takes hours to days; FPGA reconfiguration time limits the time-multiplexing ability of hardware, and tools do not reason about cross-workload flexibility. Overlay architectures mitigate the above by mapping a programmable design (e.g. CPU, GPU, etc.) on top of FPGAs. However, the abstraction gap between overlay and FPGA leads to low efficiency/utilization. Our essential idea is to develop a hardware generation framework targeting a highly-customizable overlay, so that the abstraction gap can be lowered by tuning the design instance to applications of interest. We leverage and extend prior work on customizable spatial architectures, SoC generation, accelerator compilers, and design space explorers to create an end-to-end FPGA acceleration system. Our novel techniques address inefficient networks between on-chip memories and processing elements, as well as improving DSE by reducing the amount of recompilation required. Our framework, OverGen, is highly competitive with fixed-function HLS-based designs, even though the generated designs are programmable with fast reconfiguration. We compared to a state-of-the-art DSE-based HLS framework, AutoDSE. Without kernel-tuning for AutoDSE, OverGen gets 1.2$\times$ geomean performance, and even with manual kernel-tuning for the baseline, OverGen still gets 0.55$\times$ geomean performance--all while providing runtime flexibility across workloads.
items.abstract_zh: FPGA 已被证明是跨多种类型工作负载的强大计算加速器。主流编程方法是高级综合 (HLS)，它将高级语言（例如 C+ #pragmas）映射到硬件。不幸的是，HLS 在可重配置性、定制性和多功能性方面留下了显着的可编程性差距：虽然 HLS 编译速度很快，但下游物理设计需要数小时到数天的时间； FPGA 重新配置时间限制了硬件的时间复用能力，并且工具无法考虑跨工作负载的灵活性。覆盖架构通过将可编程设计（例如 CPU、GPU 等）映射到 FPGA 之上来缓解上述问题。然而，overlay 和 FPGA 之间的抽象差距导致效率/利用率低下。我们的基本想法是开发一个针对高度可定制覆盖的硬件生成框架，以便通过将设计实例调整到感兴趣的应用程序来降低抽象差距。我们利用并扩展了先前在可定制空间架构、SoC 生成、加速器编译器和设计空间浏览器方面的工作，以创建端到端 FPGA 加速系统。我们的新技术解决了片上存储器和处理元件之间的低效网络问题，并通过减少所需的重新编译量来改进 DSE。尽管生成的设计可通过快速重新配置进行编程，但我们的框架 OverGen 与基于 HLS 的固定功能设计相比具有很强的竞争力。我们与最先进的基于 DSE 的 HLS 框架 AutoDSE 进行了比较。如果没有针对 AutoDSE 进行内核调整，OverGen 可以获得 1.2$\times$ geomean 性能，即使对基线进行手动内核调整，OverGen 仍然可以获得 0.55$\times$ geomean 性能 - 同时提供跨工作负载的运行时灵活性。

items.title: Revisiting Residue Codes for Modern Memories.
items.abstract: Residue codes have been traditionally used for compute error correction rather than storage error correction. In this paper, we use these codes for storage error correction with surprising results. We find that adapting residue codes to modern memory systems offers a level of error correction comparable to traditional schemes such as Reed-Solomon with fewer bits of storage. For instance, our adaptation of residue code – MUSE ECC – can offer ChipKill protection using approximately 30% fewer bits. We show that the storage gains can be used to hold metadata needed for emerging security functionality such as memory tagging or to provide better detection capabilities against Rowhammer attacks. Our evaluation shows that memory tagging in a MUSE-enabled system shows a 12% reduction in memory bandwidth utilization while providing the same level of error correction as a traditional ECC baseline without a noticeable loss of performance. Thus, our work demonstrates a new, flexible primitive for co-designing reliability with security and performance.
items.abstract_zh: 残差码传统上用于计算纠错而不是存储纠错。在本文中，我们使用这些代码进行存储纠错，并取得了令人惊讶的结果。我们发现，使残留码适应现代存储系统可以提供与传统方案（例如存储位数较少的里德所罗门）相当的纠错水平。例如，我们对残留代码的改编 - MUSE ECC - 可以使用大约 30% 的更少位来提供 ChipKill 保护。我们表明，存储增益可用于保存新兴安全功能（例如内存标记）所需的元数据，或提供更好的针对 Rowhammer 攻击的检测功能。我们的评估表明，支持 MUSE 的系统中的内存标记显示内存带宽利用率降低了 12%，同时提供与传统 ECC 基线相同水平的纠错，而没有明显的性能损失。因此，我们的工作展示了一种新的、灵活的原语，用于协同设计可靠性、安全性和性能。

items.title: GenPIP: In-Memory Acceleration of Genome Analysis via Tight Integration of Basecalling and Read Mapping.
items.abstract: Nanopore sequencing is a widely-used high-throughput genome sequencing technology that can sequence long fragments of a genome into raw electrical signals at lo
items.abstract_zh: 纳米孔测序是一种广泛使用的高通量基因组测序技术，可以将基因组的长片段以低通量测序为原始电信号。

items.title: COMPAQT: Compressed Waveform Memory Architecture for Scalable Qubit Control.
items.abstract: On superconducting architectures, the state of a qubit is manipulated by using microwave pulses. Typically, the pulses are stored in the waveform memory and then streamed to the Digital-to-Analog Converter (DAC) to synthesize the gate operations. The waveform memory requires tens of Gigabytes per second of bandwidth to manipulate the qubit. Unfortunately, the required memory bandwidth grows linearly with the number of qubits. As a result, the bandwidth demand limits the number of qubits we can control concurrently. For example, on current RFSoCs-based qubit control platforms, we can control less than 40 qubits. In addition, the high memory bandwidth for cryogenic ASIC controllers designed to operate within a tight power budget translates to significant power dissipation, thus limiting scalability.In this paper, we show that waveforms are highly compressible, and we leverage this property to enable a scalable and efficient microarchitecture COMPAQT - Compressed Waveform Memory Architecture for Qubit Control. Waveform memory is read-only and COMPAQT leverages this to compress waveforms at compile time and store the compressed waveform in the on-chip memory. To generate the pulse, COMPAQT decompresses the waveform at runtime and then streams the decompressed waveform to the DACs. Using the hardware-efficient discrete cosine transform, COMPAQT can achieve, on average, 5x increase in the waveform memory bandwidth, which can enable 5x increase in the total number of qubits controlled in an RFSoC setup. Moreover, COMPAQT microarchitecture for cryogenic CMOS ASIC controllers can result in a 2.5x power reduction over uncompressed baseline. We also propose an adaptive compression scheme to further reduce the power consumed by the decompression engine, enabling up to 4x power reduction. Qubits are sensitive, and even a slight change in the control waveform can increase the gate error rate. We evaluate the impact of COMPAQT on the gate and circuit fidelity using IBM quantum computers. We see less than 0.1% degradation in fidelity when using COMPAQT.
items.abstract_zh: 在超导架构中，量子位的状态是通过使用微波脉冲来操纵的。通常，脉冲存储在波形存储器中，然后流式传输到数模转换器 (DAC) 以合成门操作。波形存储器需要每秒数十GB的带宽来操纵量子位。不幸的是，所需的内存带宽随着量子位的数量线性增长。因此，带宽需求限制了我们可以同时控制的量子位数量。例如，在当前基于 RFSoC 的量子位控制平台上，我们可以控制少于 40 个量子位。此外，设计用于在严格的功率预算内运行的低温 ASIC 控制器的高内存带宽会导致显着的功耗，从而限制了可扩展性。在本文中，我们展示了波形是高度可压缩的，并且我们利用这一特性来实现可扩展且高效的微架构 COMPAQT - 用于量子位控制的压缩波形内存架构。波形存储器是只读的，COMPAQT 利用它在编译时压缩波形并将压缩后的波形存储在片上存储器中。为了生成脉冲，COMPAQT 在运行时解压缩波形，然后将解压缩的波形传输到 DAC。使用硬件高效的离散余弦变换，COMPAQT 平均可以将波形存储器带宽增加 5 倍，从而使 RFSoC 设置中控制的量子位总数增加 5 倍。此外，用于低温 CMOS ASIC 控制器的 COMPAQT 微架构可将功耗比未压缩基准降低 2.5 倍。我们还提出了一种自适应压缩方案，以进一步降低解压引擎消耗的功耗，从而实现高达 4 倍的功耗降低。量子位是敏感的，即使控制波形的微小变化也会增加门错误率。我们使用 IBM 量子计算机评估 COMPAQT 对门和电路保真度的影响。使用 COMPAQT 时，我们发现保真度下降不到 0.1%。

items.title: SwiftDir: Secure Cache Coherence without Overprotection.
items.abstract: Cache coherence states have recently been exploited to leak secrets through timing-channel attacks. The root cause lies in the fact that shared data in state Exclusive (E) and state Shared (S) are served from different cache layers. The state-of-the-art countermeasure—S-MESI—serves both E- and S-state shared data from the last-level cache (LLC) by explicitly synchronizing the Modified (M) state across private caches and the LLC. This has to sacrifice the silent upgrade feature that MESI introduces for speedup. Moreover, it enforces protection to not only exploitable shared data but also unshared data. This further slows down performance, especially for write-after-read intensive applications. In this paper, we propose SwiftDir to efficiently secure cache coherence against cover-channel attacks without overprotection. SwiftDir fundamentally narrows down the protection scope to write-protected data. Such exploitable shared data can be uniquely identified with the write-protection permission in the memory management unit (MMU) and do not necessarily transit to state M. We validate this idea through tracing system calls of shared libraries on Linux. We then investigate all three commercial cache architectures (i.e., PIPT, VIPT, and VIVT) and find it feasible to hitchhike the address translation process to transmit the write-protection information from the MMU to the coherence controller. Then SwiftDir enforces protection over only write-protected data by serving all requests toward them directly from the LLC with a constant latency. This not only simplifies how MESI handles write-protected data but also avoids how S-MESI overprotects them. Meanwhile, SwiftDir still preserves silent upgrade for efficient handling of unshared data. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our SwiftDir can secure cache coherence while outperforming not only secure SMESI but also unprotected MESI.
items.abstract_zh: 最近，缓存一致性状态被用来通过定时通道攻击来泄露秘密。根本原因在于，Exclusive (E) 状态和 Shared (S) 状态下的共享数据是由不同的缓存层提供的。最先进的对策 - S-MESI - 通过在私有缓存和 LLC 之间显式同步修改 (M) 状态，从最后一级缓存 (LLC) 提供 E 状态和 S 状态共享数据。这就必须牺牲 MESI 为加速而引入的静默升级功能。此外，它不仅对可利用的共享数据实施保护，还对非共享数据实施保护。这进一步降低了性能，特别是对于读后写密集型应用程序。在本文中，我们提出 SwiftDir 来有效地保护缓存一致性，防止覆盖通道攻击，而不会过度保护。 SwiftDir 从根本上将保护范围缩小到写保护数据。这种可利用的共享数据可以通过内存管理单元（MMU）中的写保护权限来唯一标识，并且不一定会转变为状态M。我们通过跟踪Linux上共享库的系统调用来验证这个想法。然后，我们研究了所有三种商业缓存架构（即 PIPT、VIPT 和 VIVT），并发现搭上地址转换过程的便车将写保护信息从 MMU 传输到一致性控制器是可行的。然后，SwiftDir 通过以恒定的延迟直接从 LLC 向数据提供所有请求，从而仅对写保护数据实施保护。这不仅简化了 MESI 处理写保护数据的方式，而且还避免了 S-MESI 对它们的过度保护。同时，SwiftDir 仍然保留静默升级，以高效处理非共享数据。大量实验表明，我们的 SwiftDir 可以确保缓存一致性，同时不仅优于安全的 SMESI，还优于未受保护的 MESI。

items.title: Qubit Mapping and Routing via MaxSAT.
items.abstract: Near-term quantum computers will operate in a noisy environment, without error correction. A critical problem for near-term quantum computing is laying out a logical circuit onto a physical device with limited connectivity between qubits. This is known as the qubit mapping and routing (QMR) problem, an intractable combinatorial problem. It is important to solve QMR as optimally as possible to reduce the amount of added noise, which may render a quantum computation useless. In this paper, we present a novel approach for optimally solving the QMR problem via a reduction to maximum satisfiability (MAXSAT). Additionally, we present two novel relaxation ideas that shrink the size of the MAXSAT constraints by exploiting the structure of a quantum circuit. Our thorough empirical evaluation demonstrates (1) the scalability of our approach compared to state-of-the-art optimal QMR techniques (solves more than 3x benchmarks with 40x speedup), (2) the significant cost reduction compared to state-of-the-art heuristic approaches (an average of ~5x swap reduction), and (3) the power of our proposed constraint relaxations.
items.abstract_zh: 近期的量子计算机将在嘈杂的环境中运行，而无需纠错。近期量子计算的一个关键问题是将逻辑电路布局到物理设备上，而量子位之间的连接性有限。这被称为量子位映射和路由（QMR）问题，是一个棘手的组合问题。尽可能优化地求解 QMR 以减少添加的噪声量非常重要，这可能会使量子计算变得无用。在本文中，我们提出了一种通过减少最大可满足性（MAXSAT）来优化解决 QMR 问题的新方法。此外，我们提出了两种新颖的松弛想法，通过利用量子电路的结构来缩小 MAXSAT 约束的大小。我们彻底的实证评估表明：(1) 与最先进的最佳 QMR 技术相比，我们的方法具有可扩展性（解决超过 3 倍的基准，加速 40 倍）；(2) 与最先进的启发式方法相比，成本显着降低（平均减少约 5 倍的交换）；(3) 我们提出的约束放松的威力。

items.title: Speculative Code Compaction: Eliminating Dead Code via Speculative Microcode Transformations.
items.abstract: The computing landscape has been increasingly characterized by processor architectures with increasing core counts, while a majority of the software applications remain inherently sequential. Although state-of-the-art compilers feature sophisticated optimizations, a significant chunk of wasteful computation persists due to the presence of data-dependent operations and irregular control-flow patterns that are unpredictable at compile-time. This work presents speculative code compaction (SCC), a novel microarchitectural technique that significantly enhances the capabilities of the microcode engine to aggressively and speculatively eliminate dead code from hot code regions resident in the micro-op cache, and further generate a compact stream of micro-ops, based on dynamically predicted machine code invariants. SCC also extends existing micro-op cache designs to co-host multiple versions of unoptimized and speculatively optimized micro-op sequences, providing the fetch engine with significant flexibility to dynamically choose from and stream the appropriate set of micro-ops, as and when deemed profitable.SCC is a minimally-invasive technique that can be implemented at the processor front-end using a simple ALU and a register context table, and is yet able to substantially accelerate the performance of already compile-time optimized and machine-tuned code by an average of 6% (and as much as 30%), with an average of 12% (and as much as 24%) savings in energy consumption, while eliminating the need for profiling and offering increased adaptability to changing datasets and workload patterns.
items.abstract_zh: 计算环境越来越以处理器架构为特征，核心数量不断增加，而大多数软件应用程序本质上仍然是顺序的。尽管最先进的编译器具有复杂的优化功能，但由于存在依赖于数据的操作和编译时不可预测的不规则控制流模式，大量浪费的计算仍然存在。这项工作提出了推测性代码压缩（SCC），这是一种新颖的微架构技术，它显着增强了微代码引擎的能力，可以主动地、推测性地消除驻留在微操作缓存中的热代码区域中的死代码，并基于动态预测的机器代码不变量进一步生成紧凑的微操作流。 SCC 还扩展了现有的微操作缓存设计，以共同托管未优化和推测优化的微操作序列的多个版本，为获取引擎提供了显着的灵活性，以便在认为有利可图时动态选择和流式传输适当的微操作集。SCC 是一种微创技术，可以使用简单的 ALU 和寄存器上下文表在处理器前端实现，并且能够将已编译时优化和机器调整的代码的性能平均大幅提高6%（最高可达 30%），平均能耗节省 12%（最高可达 24%），同时消除了分析需求，并增强了对不断变化的数据集和工作负载模式的适应性。

items.title: Berti: an Accurate Local-Delta Data Prefetcher.
items.abstract: Data prefetching is a technique that plays a crucial role in modern high-performance processors by hiding long latency memory accesses. Several state-of-the-art hardware prefetchers exploit the concept of deltas, defined as the difference between the cache line addresses of two demand accesses. Existing delta prefetchers, such as best offset prefetching (BOP) and multi-lookahead prefetching (MLOP), train and predict future accesses based on global deltas. We observed that the use of global deltas results in missed opportunities to anticipate memory accesses.In this paper, we propose Berti, a first-level data cache prefetcher that selects the best local deltas, i.e., those that consider only demand accesses issued by the same instruction. Thanks to a high-confidence mechanism that precisely detects the timely local deltas with high coverage, Berti generates accurate prefetch requests. Then, it orchestrates the prefetch requests to the memory hierarchy, using the selected deltas.Our empirical results using ChampSim and SPEC CPU2017 and GAP workloads show that, with a storage overhead of just 2.55 KB, Berti improves performance by 8.5% compared to a baseline IP-stride and 3.5% compared to IPCP, a state-of-the-art prefetcher. Our evaluation also shows that Berti reduces dynamic energy at the memory hierarchy by 33.6% compared to IPCP, thanks to its high prefetch accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: Data prefetching is a technique that plays a crucial role in modern high-performance processors by hiding long latency memory accesses.一些最先进的硬件预取器利用了增量的概念，增量被定义为两次请求访问的高速缓存行地址之间的差异。现有的增量预取器，例如最佳偏移预取（BOP）和多前瞻预取（MLOP），基于全局增量来训练和预测未来的访问。我们观察到，使用全局增量会导致错过预测内存访问的机会。在本文中，我们提出了 Berti，这是一种第一级数据缓存预取器，它选择最佳的局部增量，即仅考虑同一指令发出的需求访问的增量。得益于高置信度机制，能够精确检测高覆盖率的及时本地增量，Berti 生成准确的预取请求。然后，它使用选定的增量来协调对内存层次结构的预取请求。我们使用 ChampSim 和 SPEC CPU2017 以及 GAP 工作负载的实证结果表明，在存储开销仅为 2.55 KB 的情况下，Berti 与基准 IP-stride 相比，性能提高了 8.5%，与最先进的预取器 IPCP 相比，性能提高了 3.5%。我们的评估还表明，与 IPCP 相比，Berti 将内存层次结构的动态能量降低了 33.6%，这要归功于其高预取精度。

items.title: GCD2: A Globally Optimizing Compiler for Mapping DNNs to Mobile DSPs.
items.abstract: More specialized chips are exploiting available high transistor density to expose parallelism at a large scale with more intricate instruction sets. This paper reports on a compilation system GCD<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup>, developed to support complex Deep Neural Network (DNN) workloads on mobile DSP chips. We observe several challenges in fully exploiting this architecture, related to SIMD width, more complex SIMD/vector instructions, and VLIW pipeline with the notion of soft dependencies. GCD<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup> comprises the following contributions: 1) development of matrix layout formats that support the use of different novel SIMD instructions, 2) formulation and solution of a global optimization problem related to choosing the best instruction (and associated layout) for implementation of each operator in a complete DNN, and 3) SDA, an algorithm for packing instructions with consideration for soft dependencies. These solutions are incorporated in a complete compilation system that is extensively evaluated against other systems using 10 large DNN models. Evaluation results show that GCD<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup> outperforms two product-level state-of-the-art end-to-end DNN execution frameworks (TFLite and Qualcomm SNPE) that support mobile DSPs by up to $ 6.0 \times$ speedup, and outperforms three established compilers (Halide, TVM, and RAKE) by up to $4.5 \times, 3.4 \times$ and $4.0 \times$ speedup, respectively. GCD<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup> is also unique in supporting, real-time execution of certain DNNs, while its implementation enables two major DNNs to execute on a mobile DSP for the first time.
items.abstract_zh: 更专业的芯片正在利用可用的高晶体管密度，通过更复杂的指令集大规模地实现并行性。本文介绍了编译系统 GCD<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup>，该系统是为支持移动 DSP 芯片上复杂的深度神经网络 (DNN) 工作负载而开发的。我们观察到充分利用该架构时面临的一些挑战，涉及 SIMD 宽度、更复杂的 SIMD/向量指令以及具有软依赖概念的 VLIW 管道。 GCD<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup> 包括以下贡献：1) 开发支持使用不同新颖 SIMD 指令的矩阵布局格式，2) 制定和解决与选择最佳指令（以及相关布局）以完整实现每个运算符相关的全局优化问题。 DNN, and 3) SDA, an algorithm for packing instructions with consideration for soft dependencies. These solutions are incorporated in a complete compilation system that is extensively evaluated against other systems using 10 large DNN models.评估结果表明，GCD<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup> 比支持移动 DSP 的两个最先进的产品级端到端 DNN 执行框架（TFLite 和 Qualcomm SNPE）的性能高出高达 $ 6.0 \times$ 加速，并且比三个成熟的编译器（Halide、TVM 和 RAKE）分别提升高达 $4.5 \times、3.4 \times$ 和 $4.0 \times$ 加速。 GCD<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">2</sup> 在支持某些 DNN 的实时执行方面也是独一无二的，同时它的实现首次使两个主要的 DNN 能够在移动 DSP 上执行。

items.title: CORUSCANT: Fast Efficient Processing-in-Racetrack Memories.
items.abstract: The growth in data needs of modern applications has created significant challenges for modern systems leading to a “memory wall.” Spintronic Domain-Wall Memory (DWM), provides near-SRAM read/write performance, energy savings and non-volatility, potential for extremely high storage density, and does not have significant endurance limitations. However, DWM’s benefits cannot directly address data access latency and throughput limitations of memory bus bandwidth. Processing-inmemory (PIM) is a popular solution to reduce the demands of memory-to-processor communication by offloading computation directly to the memory. PIM has been proposed in multiple technologies including DRAM, Phase-change memory (PCM), resistive memory (ReRAM), and Spin-Transfer Torque Memory (STT-MRAM). DRAM PIM provides solutions for a restricted set of two operand bulk-bitwise operations. PIM in PCM and ReRAM raise concerns about their effective endurance and PIM in STT-MRAM has insufficient density for main-memory applications. We propose CORUSCANT, a DWM-based in-memory computing solution that leverages the properties of DWM nanowires and allows them to serve as polymorphic gates. While normally DWM is accessed by applying spin polarized currents orthogonal to the nanowire at access points to read individual bits, transverse access along the DWM nanowire allows the differentiation of the aggregate resistance of multiple bits in the nanowire, akin to a multi-level cell. CORUSCANT leverages this transverse reading to directly provide multi-operand bulk-bitwise logic. Leveraging this multi-operand concept enabled by transverse access, CORUSCANT provides techniques to conduct multi-operand addition and two operand multiplication much more efficiently than prior digital PIM solutions. CORUSCANT provides a 1.6 × speedup compared to the leading DRAM PIM technique for query applications that leverage bulk bitwise operations. Compared to the leading PIM technique for DWM, CORUSCANT improves performance by 6.9 ×, 2.3 × and energy by 5.5 ×, 3.4 × for 8-bit addition and multiplication, respectively. For arithmetic heavy benchmarks, CORUSCANT reduces access latency by 2.1 ×, while decreasing energy consumption by 25.2 × for a 10% area overhead versus non-PIM DWM.
items.abstract_zh: The growth in data needs of modern applications has created significant challenges for modern systems leading to a “memory wall.”自旋电子畴壁存储器 (DWM) 提供接近 SRAM 的读/写性能、节能和非易失性、极高存储密度的潜力，并且没有明显的耐用性限制。 However, DWM’s benefits cannot directly address data access latency and throughput limitations of memory bus bandwidth.内存处理 (PIM) 是一种流行的解决方案，通过将计算直接卸载到内存来减少内存到处理器通信的需求。 PIM 已在多种技术中被提出，包括 DRAM、相变存储器 (PCM)、电阻存储器 (ReRAM) 和自旋转移扭矩存储器 (STT-MRAM)。 DRAM PIM provides solutions for a restricted set of two operand bulk-bitwise operations. PIM in PCM and ReRAM raise concerns about their effective endurance and PIM in STT-MRAM has insufficient density for main-memory applications.我们提出了 CORUSCANT，这是一种基于 DWM 的内存计算解决方案，它利用 DWM 纳米线的特性并允许它们充当多态门。虽然通常通过在接入点施加与纳米线正交的自旋极化电流来读取各个位来访问 DWM，但沿着 DWM 纳米线的横向访问允许区分纳米线中多个位的总电阻，类似于多层单元。 CORUSCANT leverages this transverse reading to directly provide multi-operand bulk-bitwise logic.利用横向访问实现的多操作数概念，CORUSCANT 提供了比以前的数字 PIM 解决方案更有效地进行多操作数加法和两个操作数乘法的技术。 CORUSCANT provides a 1.6 × speedup compared to the leading DRAM PIM technique for query applications that leverage bulk bitwise operations.与领先的 DWM PIM 技术相比，CORUSCANT 将 8 位加法和乘法的性能分别提高了 6.9 ×、2.3 ×，能量分别提高了 5.5 ×、3.4 ×。对于算术密集型基准测试，与非 PIM DWM 相比，CORUSCANT 将访问延迟降低了 2.1 倍，同时将能耗降低了 25.2 倍，区域开销为 10%。

items.title: Translation-optimized Memory Compression for Capacity.
items.abstract: The demand for memory is ever increasing. Many prior works have explored hardware memory compression to increase effective memory capacity. However, prior works compress and pack/migrate data at a small - memory block-level - granularity; this introduces an additional block-level translation after the page-level virtual address translation. In general, the smaller the granularity of address translation, the higher the translation overhead. As such, this additional block-level translation exacerbates the well-known address translation problem for large and/or irregular workloads. A promising solution is to only save memory from cold (i.e., less recently accessed) pages without saving memory from hot (i.e., more recently accessed) pages (e.g., keep the hot pages uncompressed); this avoids block-level translation overhead for hot pages. However, it still faces two challenges. First, after a compressed cold page becomes hot again, migrating the page to a full 4KB DRAM location still adds another level (albeit page-level, instead of block-level) of translation on top of existing virtual address translation. Second, only compressing cold data require compressing them very aggressively to achieve high overall memory savings; decompressing very aggressively compressed data is very slow (e.g., $\gt 800 ns$ assuming the latest Deflate ASIC in industry). This paper presents Translation-optimized Memory Compression for Capacity (TMCC) to tackle the two challenges above. To address the first challenge, we propose compressing page table blocks in hardware to opportunistically embed compression translations into them in a software-transparent manner to effectively prefetch compression translations during a page walk, instead of serially fetching them after the walk. To address the second challenge, we perform a large design space exploration across many hardware configurations and diverse workloads to derive and implement in HDL an ASIC Deflate that is specialized for memory; for memory pages, it is 4X as fast as the state-of-the art ASIC Deflate, with little to no sacrifice in compression ratio. Our evaluations show that for large and/or irregular workloads, TMCC can either improve performance by 14% without sacrificing effective capacity or provide 2.2x the effective capacity without sacrificing performance compared to a state-of-the-art hardware memory compression for capacity.
items.abstract_zh: 对内存的需求不断增加。许多先前的工作已经探索了硬件内存压缩以增加有效内存容量。然而，先前的工作以较小的内存块级粒度压缩和打包/迁移数据；这在页级虚拟地址转换之后引入了额外的块级转换。一般来说，地址转换的粒度越小，转换开销就越高。因此，这种额外的块级转换加剧了大型和/或不规则工作负载的众所周知的地址转换问题。一个有前途的解决方案是仅从冷（即最近访问较少）页面节省内存，而不从热（即最近访问较多）页面节省内存（例如，保持热页未压缩）；这避免了热页的块级转换开销。然而，它仍然面临两个挑战。首先，在压缩的冷页再次变热后，将该页迁移到完整的 4KB DRAM 位置仍然会在现有虚拟地址转换之上添加另一个级别的转换（尽管是页级，而不是块级）。其次，仅压缩冷数据就需要非常积极地压缩它们，以实现较高的总体内存节省；解压缩非常激进的压缩数据非常慢（例如，假设业界最新的 Deflate ASIC，$\gt 800 ns$）。本文提出了翻译优化的容量内存压缩（TMCC）来解决上述两个挑战。为了解决第一个挑战，我们建议在硬件中压缩页表块，以软件透明的方式机会性地将压缩翻译嵌入到其中，从而在页面遍历期间有效地预取压缩翻译，而不是在遍历之后串行获取它们。为了解决第二个挑战，我们在许多硬件配置和不同的工作负载中进行了大型设计空间探索，以在 HDL 中派生并实现专门用于内存的 ASIC Deflate；对于内存页面，它的速度是最先进的 ASIC Deflate 的 4 倍，并且几乎不牺牲压缩比。我们的评估表明，对于大型和/或不规则工作负载，与最先进的硬件内存压缩容量相比，TMCC 可以在不牺牲有效容量的情况下将性能提高 14%，或者在不牺牲性能的情况下提供 2.2 倍的有效容量。

items.title: DiVa: An Accelerator for Differentially Private Machine Learning.
items.abstract: The widespread deployment of machine learning (ML) is raising serious concerns on protecting the privacy of users who contributed to the collection of training data. Differential privacy (DP) is rapidly gaining momentum in the industry as a practical standard for privacy protection. Despite DP’s importance, however, little has been explored within the computer systems community regarding the implication of this emerging ML algorithm on system designs. In this work, we conduct a detailed workload characterization on a state-of-the-art differentially private ML training algorithm named DPSGD. We uncover several unique properties of DP-SGD (e.g., its high memory capacity and computation requirements vs. non-private ML), root-causing its key bottlenecks. Based on our analysis, we propose an accelerator for differentially private ML named DiVa, which provides a significant improvement in compute utilization, leading to 2.6× higher energy-efficiency vs. conventional systolic arrays.
items.abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 的广泛部署引发了人们对保护参与训练数据收集的用户隐私的严重担忧。差分隐私（DP）作为隐私保护的实用标准在业界迅速发展。然而，尽管 DP 很重要，但计算机系统社区内很少有人探讨这种新兴的 ML 算法对系统设计的影响。在这项工作中，我们对名为 DPSGD 的最先进的差分隐私 ML 训练算法进行了详细的工作负载表征。我们发现了 DP-SGD 的几个独特属性（例如，与非私有 ML 相比，其高内存容量和计算要求），从根本上导致了其关键瓶颈。根据我们的分析，我们提出了一种名为 DiVa 的差分私有 ML 加速器，它显着提高了计算利用率，与传统脉动阵列相比，能源效率提高了 2.6 倍。

items.title: Treebeard: An Optimizing Compiler for Decision Tree Based ML Inference.
items.abstract: Decision tree ensembles are among the most commonly used machine learning models. These models are used in a wide range of applications and are deployed at scale. Decision tree ensemble inference is usually performed with libraries such as XGBoost, LightGBM, and Sklearn. These libraries incorporate a fixed set of optimizations for the hardware targets they support. However, maintaining these optimizations is prohibitively expensive with the evolution of hardware. Further, they do not specialize the inference code to the model being used, leaving significant performance on the table. This paper presents TREEBEARD, an optimizing compiler that progressively lowers the inference computation to optimized CPU code through multiple intermediate abstractions. By applying model-specific optimizations at the higher levels, tree walk optimizations at the middle level, and machine-specific optimizations lower down, TREEBEARD can specialize inference code for each model on each supported CPU target. TREEBEARD combines several novel optimizations at various abstraction levels to mitigate architectural bottlenecks and enable SIMD vectorization of tree walks. We implement TREEBEARD using the MLIR compiler infrastructure and demonstrate its utility by evaluating it on a diverse set of benchmarks. TREEBEARD is significantly faster than state-of-the-art systems, XGBoost, Treelite and Hummingbird, by 2.6×, 4.7× and 5.4× respectively in a single-core execution setting, and by 2.3×, 2.7× and 14× respectively in multi-core settings.
items.abstract_zh: 决策树集成是最常用的机器学习模型之一。这些模型用于广泛的应用程序并大规模部署。决策树集成推理通常使用 XGBoost、LightGBM 和 Sklearn 等库进行。这些库针对它们支持的硬件目标包含一组固定的优化。然而，随着硬件的发展，维持这些优化的成本极其昂贵。此外，他们没有将推理代码专门用于所使用的模型，从而导致性能显着下降。本文介绍了 TREEBEARD，这是一种优化编译器，可通过多个中间抽象逐步将推理计算降低到优化的 CPU 代码。通过在较高级别应用特定于模型的优化、在中间级别应用树遍历优化以及在较低级别应用特定于机器的优化，TREEBEARD 可以在每个受支持的 CPU 目标上为每个模型专门化推理代码。 TREEBEARD 结合了多种抽象级别的新颖优化，以缓解架构瓶颈并实现树遍历的 SIMD 矢量化。我们使用 MLIR 编译器基础设施实现 TREEBEARD，并通过在不同的基准测试集上对其进行评估来展示其实用性。 TREEBEARD 的速度明显快于最先进的系统 XGBoost、Treelite 和 Hummingbird，在单核执行设置中分别快 2.6 倍、4.7 倍和 5.4 倍，在多核设置中分别快 2.3 倍、2.7 倍和 14 倍。

items.title: Designing Virtual Memory System of MCM GPUs.
items.abstract: Multi-Chip Module (MCM) designs have emerged as a key technique to scale up a GPU’s compute capabilities in the face of slowing transistor technology. However, the disaggregated nature of MCM GPUs with many chiplets connected via in-package interconnects leads to non-uniformity. We explore the implications of MCM’s non-uniformity on the GPU’s virtual memory. We quantitatively demonstrate that an MCM-aware virtual memory system should aim to 1 leverage aggregate TLB capacity across chiplets while limiting accesses to L2 TLB on remote chiplets, 2 reduce accesses to page table entries resident on a remote chiplet’s memory during page walks. We propose MCM-aware GPU virtual memory (MGvm) that leverages static analysis techniques, previously used for thread and data placement, to map virtual addresses to chiplets and to place the page tables. At runtime, MGvm balances its objective of limiting the number of remote L2 TLB lookups with that of reducing the number of remote page table accesses to achieve good speedups (52%, on average) across diverse application behaviors.
items.abstract_zh: 面对速度缓慢的晶体管技术，多芯片模块 (MCM) 设计已成为扩展 GPU 计算能力的关键技术。然而，MCM GPU 的分散性质（具有通过封装内互连连接的许多小芯片）会导致不均匀性。我们探讨了 MCM 的不均匀性对 GPU 虚拟内存的影响。我们定量地证明，MCM 感知虚拟内存系统的目标应该是 1 利用跨 Chiplet 的聚合 TLB 容量，同时限制对远程 Chiplet 上的 L2 TLB 的访问，2 在页面遍历期间减少对驻留在远程 Chiplet 内存上的页表条目的访问。我们提出了 MCM 感知 GPU 虚拟内存 (MGvm)，它利用以前用于线程和数据放置的静态分析技术，将虚拟地址映射到小芯片并放置页表。在运行时，MGvm 平衡其限制远程 L2 TLB 查找数量与减少远程页表访问数量的目标，以在不同的应用程序行为中实现良好的加速（平均 52%）。

items.title: PageORAM: An Efficient DRAM Page Aware ORAM Strategy.
items.abstract: Leaking memory access addresses can significantly empower an adversary in several computing usage scenarios – from key extraction to disclosing private information. Oblivious RAM has been proposed as a solution to this problem. Oblivious RAM involves reading multiple blocks instead of a single block for each memory access and changing the address of the data block being read after each access. State-of-the-art ORAMs (PathORAM and RingORAM) consider a tree-based structure for storing the data. However, ORAM designs pay a performance penalty. One reason is the strict requirement to evict stash blocks on a particular path that was previously read from. In treebased ORAMs, each memory block is assigned a random path number, and when accessing a single block, one must fetch all the blocks in that path. Once the path is fetched into a client, the computation on the block is performed and that block is assigned a new random path number. All the blocks that were fetched into the client should be evicted to the memory. However, the eviction process must place the unmodified blocks on the same path that the prior read has fetched data from. This eviction requirement may cause a block not to be placed back in the ORAM tree due to limited space on a given tree node. As a result, the client must temporarily hold the block in its stash, which is a secure storage. Every fetch request for a block must search the stash before issuing a request to the ORAM. As the stash size grows, the stash search process becomes a substantial latency hurdle. On the other hand, if the stash is small then the client has to issue dummy reads which are useless reads in the tree for the sole purpose of creating more opportunities to place the stash data back in the tree. An alternate approach used in prior works is to embed dummy data blocks to create large bucket sizes at each tree level to enable better stash eviction probability. Neither of the above two solutions is palatable in practice. Dummy reads increase memory access latency, while dummy blocks increase the fetch bandwidth to bring large buckets from each level into the stash. Furthermore, dummy blocks also decrease the effective memory size available.To solve this problem we propose PageORAM, a novel block eviction and placement strategy. PageORAM makes the critical observation that DRAM is accessed at the granularity of a page (also referred to as row buffer), which is at least an order magnitude larger than the tree node size. Thus, a page may hold data blocks from multiple sub-trees. Hence, when fetching a path, PageORAM fetches a few additional sub-paths from the tree that are already present in an open DRAM page. These additional fetches vastly increase stash eviction options by opening up exponentially more data block placement choices. Thus, PageORAM enables a dramatic reduction in stash size without increasing page access counts in DRAM. While this observation may be counter-intuitive, we note that PageORAM reduces the overall bandwidth even after accounting for the increased fetches along the sub-paths. The reason is that by vastly improving stash block placement possibilities, PageORAM can significantly reduce the bucket size of the tree. Our implementation of PageORAM demonstrates an order of magnitude slower stash growth, increased bucket occupancy with useful data, and correspondingly improved memory access latency and reduced memory bandwidth. In our experiments, we find that PageORAM can either reduce the memory space requirement of the tree-based ORAMs by up to 40% compared to baseline tree-based ORAM or give a performance improvement of up to 7.8x for the same structured tree-based ORAM.
items.abstract_zh: 泄漏内存访问地址可以在多种计算使用场景中显着增强对手的能力——从密钥提取到泄露私人信息。 Oblivious RAM 已被提议作为该问题的解决方案。 Oblivious RAM涉及每次存储器访问读取多个块而不是单个块，并在每次访问后更改正在读取的数据块的地址。最先进的 ORAM（PathORAM 和 RingORAM）考虑使用基于树的结构来存储数据。然而，ORAM 设计会带来性能损失。原因之一是严格要求逐出先前读取的特定路径上的存储块。在基于树的 ORAM 中，每个内存块都分配有一个随机路径号，当访问单个块时，必须获取该路径中的所有块。一旦路径被提取到客户端，就会执行块上的计算，并为该块分配一个新的随机路径号。所有被提取到客户端的块都应该被逐出到内存中。但是，逐出过程必须将未修改的块放置在先前读取从中获取数据的同一路径上。由于给定树节点上的空间有限，此驱逐要求可能会导致块无法放回 ORAM 树中。因此，客户端必须暂时将该块保存在其存储中，这是一个安全存储。每个块的获取请求都必须在向 ORAM 发出请求之前搜索存储区。随着存储大小的增长，存储搜索过程成为一个巨大的延迟障碍。另一方面，如果存储很小，那么客户端必须发出虚拟读取，这些读取在树中是无用的读取，其唯一目的是创造更多机会将存储数据放回树中。先前工作中使用的另一种方法是嵌入虚拟数据块，以在每个树级别创建大的存储桶大小，以实现更好的存储驱逐概率。上述两种解决方案在实践中均不可取。虚拟读取会增加内存访问延迟，而虚拟块会增加获取带宽，以将每个级别的大存储桶放入存储中。此外，虚拟块还会减少可用的有效内存大小。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 PageORAM，一种新颖的块驱逐和放置策略。 PageORAM 进行了严格的观察，即 DRAM 是以页（也称为行缓冲区）的粒度进行访问的，该粒度至少比树节点大小大一个数量级。因此，一个页面可以保存来自多个子树的数据块。因此，当获取路径时，PageORAM 会从树中获取一些已存在于打开的 DRAM 页面中的附加子路径。这些额外的获取通过开放更多的数据块放置选择，极大地增加了存储驱逐选项。因此，PageORAM 可以显着减少存储大小，而无需增加 DRAM 中的页面访问计数。虽然这一观察结果可能违反直觉，但我们注意到，即使考虑到沿子路径的获取增加，PageORAM 也会减少总体带宽。原因是，通过极大地提高存储块放置的可能性，PageORAM 可以显着减小树的存储桶大小。我们的 PageORAM 实现表明存储增长速度减慢了一个数量级，有用数据的存储桶占用率增加，并且相应地改善了内存访问延迟并减少了内存带宽。在我们的实验中，我们发现与基线基于树的 ORAM 相比，PageORAM 可以将基于树的 ORAM 的内存空间需求减少高达 40%，或者为相同结构的基于树的 ORAM 提供高达 7.8 倍的性能提升。

items.title: An Architectural Charge Management Interface for Energy-Harvesting Systems.
items.abstract: Energy-harvesting devices eliminate batteries, instead collecting their operating energy from environmental sources. A device stores energy into a capacitor, drawing energy to perform tasks and powering off to recharge when the energy is exhausted. State-of-the-art charge management systems for these devices aim to avoid power failure during task execution by reasoning about task energy cost. We identify that the innate equivalent series resistance (ESR) in energy storage capacitors breaks energy-based systems’ guarantees; running high current load on a high-ESR capacitor causes a substantial voltage drop that rebounds once the load is removed. This voltage drop is disregarded by systems that only reason about energy. If the drop lowers the voltage below the system’s operating threshold, however, the device powers off while stored energy remains. Though ESR is well understood in hardware design, this is the first work to argue that software for batteryless devices must also be aware of ESR.This work presents Culpeo, a hardware/software mechanism and architectural interface to relay the effect of ESR in the power system to software. We develop static and dynamic implementations of Culpeo and demonstrate on real batteryless devices that considering ESR restores correctness guarantees broken by energy-only charge management. We then demonstrate how to integrate Culpeo’s safe voltage into state-of-the-art schedulers, restoring task deadline guarantees for applications with predictable energy harvesting. Finally, we propose an on-chip Culpeo hardware implementation that allows for runtime monitoring of the effects of ESR to respond to changes in harvestable power.
items.abstract_zh: 能量收集设备消除了电池，而是从环境来源收集其运行能量。设备将能量存储到电容器中，吸收能量来执行任务，并在能量耗尽时关闭电源进行充电。这些设备最先进的充电管理系统旨在通过推理任务能源成本来避免任务执行期间的电源故障。我们发现储能电容器中固有的等效串联电阻（ESR）破坏了基于能量的系统的保证；在高 ESR 电容器上运行高电流负载会导致显着的电压降，一旦负载移除，电压就会反弹。仅考虑能量的系统会忽略此电压降。然而，如果压降使电压低于系统的工作阈值，设备就会关闭，同时存储的能量仍然存在。虽然 ESR 在硬件设计中得到了很好的理解，但这是第一个主张无电池设备的软件也必须了解 ESR 的工作。这项工作提出了 Culpeo，一种硬件/软件机制和架构接口，用于将电源系统中 ESR 的影响传递给软件。我们开发了 Culpeo 的静态和动态实现，并在真正的无电池设备上进行了演示，考虑到 ESR 恢复了纯能量充电管理所破坏的正确性保证。然后，我们演示如何将 Culpeo 的安全电压集成到最先进的调度程序中，为具有可预测能量收集的应用恢复任务截止日期保证。最后，我们提出了一种片上 Culpeo 硬件实现，允许运行时监控 ESR 的影响，以响应可收获功率的变化。

items.title: Vulkan-Sim: A GPU Architecture Simulator for Ray Tracing.
items.abstract: Ray tracing can generate photorealistic images with more convincing visual effects compared to rasterization. Recent hardware advances have enabled ray tracing to be applied in real-time. Current GPUs feature a dedicated ray tracing acceleration unit, and game developers have started to make use of ray tracing APIs to bring more realistic graphics to their players. Industry cooperatively contributed to Vulkan, which recently introduced an open-standard API for ray tracing. However, little has been disclosed about the mapping of this API to hardware. In this paper, we introduce Vulkan-Sim, a detailed cycle-level simulator for enabling architecture research for ray tracing. We extend GPGPU-Sim, integrating it with Mesa, an open-source graphics library to support the Vulkan API, and add dedicated ray traversal and intersection units. We also demonstrate an explicit mapping of the Vulkan ray tracing pipeline to a modern GPU using a technique we call delayed intersection and any-hit execution. Additionally we evaluate several ray tracing workloads with Vulkan-Sim, identifying bottlenecks and inefficiencies of the ray tracing hardware we model. To demonstrate the utility of Vulkan-Sim we conduct two case studies evaluating techniques recently proposed or deployed by industry targeting enhanced ray tracing performance.
items.abstract_zh: Ray tracing can generate photorealistic images with more convincing visual effects compared to rasterization. Recent hardware advances have enabled ray tracing to be applied in real-time.当前的 GPU 具有专用的光线追踪加速单元，游戏开发人员已开始利用光线追踪 API 为玩家带来更真实的图形。 Industry cooperatively contributed to Vulkan, which recently introduced an open-standard API for ray tracing. However, little has been disclosed about the mapping of this API to hardware. In this paper, we introduce Vulkan-Sim, a detailed cycle-level simulator for enabling architecture research for ray tracing.我们扩展了 GPGPU-Sim，将其与开源图形库 Mesa 集成以支持 Vulkan API，并添加专用的光线遍历和交叉单元。我们还使用我们称为延迟交集和任意命中执行的技术演示了 Vulkan 光线追踪管道到现代 GPU 的显式映射。此外，我们使用 Vulkan-Sim 评估多个光线追踪工作负载，识别我们建模的光线追踪硬件的瓶颈和低效率。为了展示 Vulkan-Sim 的实用性，我们进行了两个案例研究，评估行业最近提出或部署的旨在增强光线追踪性能的技术。

items.title: AQUA: Scalable Rowhammer Mitigation by Quarantining Aggressor Rows at Runtime.
items.abstract: Rowhammer allows an attacker to induce bit flips in a row by rapidly accessing neighboring rows. Rowhammer is a severe security threat as it can be used to escalate privilege or break confidentiality. Moreover, the threshold of activations needed to induce Rowhammer continues to reduce and new attacks like Half-Double break existing solutions that refresh victim rows. The recently proposed Randomized Row-Swap (RRS) scheme is resilient to Half-Double as it provides mitigation by swapping an aggressor row with a random row. However, to ensure security, the threshold for triggering a row-swap must be set much lower than the Rowhammer threshold, leading to a significant performance loss of 20% on average, at a Rowhammer threshold of 1K. Furthermore, the SRAM overhead for storing the indirection table of RRS becomes prohibitively large – 2.4MB per rank at a Rowhammer threshold of 1K. Our goal is to develop a scalable Rowhammer mitigation that incurs negligible performance and storage overheads.To this end, we propose AQUA, a Rowhammer mitigation that breaks the spatial correlation between aggressor and victim rows by dynamically quarantining the aggressor row in a dedicated region of memory. AQUA allows for an effective row migration threshold much higher than in RRS, leading to an order of magnitude less slowdown and SRAM. As the security of AQUA is not reliant on keeping the destination row a secret, we further reduce the SRAM overheads of the indirection table by storing it in DRAM, and accessing it on-demand. We derive the size of the quarantine region required to ensure security for AQUA and show that reserving about 1% of DRAM is sufficient to mitigate Rowhammer at a threshold of 1K. Our evaluations show that AQUA incurs an average slowdown of 2% and an SRAM overhead (for mapping and migration) of only 41KB per rank at a Rowhammer threshold of 1K.
items.abstract_zh: Rowhammer 允许攻击者通过快速访问相邻行来引发行中的位翻转。 Rowhammer 是一种严重的安全威胁，因为它可用于提升权限或破坏机密性。此外，引发 Rowhammer 所需的激活阈值持续降低，Half-Double 等新攻击破坏了刷新受害者行的现有解决方案。最近提出的随机行交换（RRS）方案对半双倍具有弹性，因为它通过将攻击者行与随机行交换来提供缓解。但为了保证安全性，触发行交换的阈值必须设置得远低于Rowhammer阈值，导致在Rowhammer阈值为1K时，平均性能损失高达20%。此外，用于存储 RRS 间接表的 SRAM 开销变得非常大 – Rowhammer 阈值为 1K 时每列 2.4MB。我们的目标是开发一种可扩展的 Rowhammer 缓解措施，其性能和存储开销可以忽略不计。为此，我们提出了 AQUA，这是一种 Rowhammer 缓解措施，它通过在专用内存区域中动态隔离攻击者行来打破攻击者行和受害者行之间的空间相关性。 AQUA 允许有效的行迁移阈值远高于 RRS，从而导致速度减慢和 SRAM 减少一个数量级。由于 AQUA 的安全性不依赖于对目标行保密，因此我们通过将间接表存储在 DRAM 中并按需访问来进一步减少间接表的 SRAM 开销。我们得出了确保 AQUA 安全所需的隔离区域的大小，并表明保留约 1% 的 DRAM 足以在 1K 阈值下缓解 Rowhammer。我们的评估显示，在 Rowhammer 阈值为 1K 的情况下，AQUA 的平均速度下降了 2%，并且每个等级的 SRAM 开销（用于映射和迁移）仅为 41KB。

items.title: IDLD: Instantaneous Detection of Leakage and Duplication of Identifiers used for Register Renaming.
items.abstract: In this paper, we propose a cost-effective microarchitectural technique capable of Instantaneously Detecting the Leakage and Duplication (IDLD) of the physical register identifiers used for register renaming in modern out-of-order processor cores. Leakage occurs when a physical register identifier disappears, whereas duplication occurs when the physical register identifier appears twice throughout the renaming logic. IDLD checks each cycle that a code calculated by xoring the physical register identifiers read from and written to arrays, used for managing physical registers allocation, renaming and reclamation, is zero. This invariance is intrinsic to the register renaming subsystem functionality and allows detecting an identifier leakage and duplication instantaneously. Detection of bugs in the complex register renaming subsystem is challenging, since: (a) its operation is not directly observable in program or architectural visible locations, (b) it lies in time-critical paths in the heart of every modern out-of-order core, and (c) it is often the target for optimizations in new core designs, and thus, more susceptible to bugs than legacy subsystems. We demonstrate that bugs in the renaming logic can be very difficult to root cause because, for numerous cases, it takes excessive time, e.g., millions of cycles, for a duplication or leakage to become an architecturally observable error. Even worse, activations of such bugs, depending on microarchitectural state, are often masked by subsequent hardware operations. Hence, an activation of a rarely occurring leakage or duplication bug during post-silicon validation can go undetected and escape in the field. The difficulty of root-causing register identifier duplication and leakage without IDLD is demonstrated using detailed bug modeling at the microarchitecture level, whereas the low overhead of IDLD is confirmed using RTL design analysis.
items.abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种经济高效的微架构技术，能够即时检测现代乱序处理器内核中用于寄存器重命名的物理寄存器标识符的泄漏和重复（IDLD）。当物理寄存器标识符消失时发生泄漏，而当物理寄存器标识符在整个重命名逻辑中出现两次时发生重复。 IDLD 在每个周期检查通过异或从阵列读取和写入阵列的物理寄存器标识符计算出的代码是否为零，该代码用于管理物理寄存器分配、重命名和回收。 This invariance is intrinsic to the register renaming subsystem functionality and allows detecting an identifier leakage and duplication instantaneously.检测复杂的寄存器重命名子系统中的错误具有挑战性，因为：（a）其操作在程序或架构可见位置中无法直接观察到，（b）它位于每个现代乱序核心核心的时间关键路径中，以及（c）它通常是新核心设计中的优化目标，因此比遗留子系统更容易受到错误的影响。我们证明，重命名逻辑中的错误可能很难找到根本原因，因为在许多情况下，重复或泄漏需要花费过多的时间（例如数百万个周期）才能成为架构上可观察到的错误。更糟糕的是，根据微架构状态，此类错误的激活通常会被后续的硬件操作所掩盖。因此，在硅后验证过程中很少发生的泄漏或重复错误的激活可能不会被发现并在现场逃脱。使用微架构级别的详细错误建模证明了在没有 IDLD 的情况下导致寄存器标识符重复和泄漏的根本原因的难度，而 IDLD 的低开销则通过 RTL 设计分析得到证实。

items.title: DPU-v2: Energy-efficient execution of irregular directed acyclic graphs.
items.abstract: A growing number of applications like probabilistic machine learning, sparse linear algebra, robotic navigation, etc., exhibit irregular data flow computation that can be modeled with directed acyclic graphs (DAGs). The irregularity arises from the seemingly random connections of nodes, which makes the DAG structure unsuitable for vectorization on CPU or GPU. Moreover, the nodes usually represent a small number of arithmetic operations that cannot amortize the overhead of launching tasks/kernels for each node, further posing challenges for parallel execution. To enable energy-efficient execution, this work proposes DAG processing unit (DPU) version 2, a specialized processor architecture optimized for irregular DAGs with static connectivity. It consists of a tree-structured datapath for efficient data reuse, a customized banked register file, and interconnects tuned to support irregular register accesses. DPU-v2 is utilized effectively through a targeted compiler that systematically maps operations to the datapath, minimizes register bank conflicts, and avoids pipeline hazards. Finally, a design space exploration identifies the optimal architecture configuration that minimizes the energy-delay product. This hardware-software co-optimization approach results in a speedup of $1.4 \times, 3.5 \times $, and $14 \times $ over a state-of-the-art DAG processor ASIP, a CPU, and a GPU, respectively, while also achieving a lower energy-delay product. In this way, this work takes an important step towards enabling an embedded execution of emerging DAG workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 越来越多的应用程序（例如概率机器学习、稀疏线性代数、机器人导航等）表现出不规则的数据流计算，可以使用有向无环图 (DAG) 进行建模。这种不规则性源于节点看似随机的连接，这使得 DAG 结构不适合在 CPU 或 GPU 上进行矢量化。此外，节点通常代表少量算术运算，无法分摊为每个节点启动任务/内核的开销，这进一步给并行执行带来了挑战。为了实现节能执行，这项工作提出了 DAG 处理单元 (DPU) 版本 2，这是一种针对具有静态连接的不规则 DAG 进行优化的专用处理器架构。它由用于高效数据重用的树形结构数据路径、定制的分组寄存器文件以及经过调整以支持不规则寄存器访问的互连组成。 DPU-v2 通过目标编译器得到有效利用，该编译器系统地将操作映射到数据路径，最大限度地减少寄存器组冲突，并避免管道危险。最后，设计空间探索确定了最小化能量延迟积的最佳架构配置。这种硬件-软件协同优化方法比最先进的 DAG 处理器 ASIP、CPU 和 GPU 分别实现了 1.4 美元、3.5 美元和 14 美元的加速，同时还实现了更低的能量延迟乘积。通过这种方式，这项工作朝着实现新兴 DAG 工作负载的嵌入式执行迈出了重要的一步。

items.title: Exploring Instruction Fusion Opportunities in General Purpose Processors.
items.abstract: The Complex Instruction Set Computer (CISC) paradigm has led to the introduction of instruction cracking in which an architectural instruction is divided into multiple microarchitectural instructions ($\mu$-ops). However, the dual concept, instruction fusion is also prevalent in modern microarchitectures to maximize resource utilization. In essence, some architectural instructions are too complex to be executed as a unit, so they should be cracked, while others are too simple to waste resources on executing them as a unit, so they should be fused with others. In this paper, we focus on instruction fusion and explore opportunities for fusing additional instructions in a high-performance general purpose pipeline. We show that enabling fusion for common RISC-V idioms improves performance by 7%. Then, we determine experimentally that enabling fusion only for memory instructions achieves 86% of the potential of fusion in this particular case. Finally, we propose the Helios microarchitecture, able to fuse non-consecutive and noncontiguous memory instructions, and discuss microarchitectural changes required to do so efficiently while preserving correctness. Helios allows to fuse an additional 5.5% of dynamic instructions, yielding a 14.2% performance uplift over no fusion (8.2% over baseline fusion).
items.abstract_zh: 复杂指令集计算机（CISC）范例导致了指令破解的引入，其中一个架构指令被分为多个微架构指令（$\mu$-ops）。然而，指令融合这一双重概念在现代微架构中也很普遍，以最大限度地提高资源利用率。从本质上讲，一些架构指令太复杂，无法作为一个单元执行，因此应该破解它们，而另一些指令则太简单，无法浪费资源作为一个单元执行，因此应该将它们与其他指令融合。在本文中，我们重点关注指令融合，并探索在高性能通用管道中融合附加指令的机会。我们证明，启用常见 RISC-V 惯用语的融合可将性能提高 7%。然后，我们通过实验确定，在此特定情况下，仅对内存指令启用融合可以实现 86% 的融合潜力。最后，我们提出了 Helios 微架构，它能够融合非连续和非连续的内存指令，并讨论了在保持正确性的同时有效地做到这一点所需的微架构变化。 Helios 允许融合额外 5.5% 的动态指令，与不融合相比，性能提升 14.2%（比基线融合提升 8.2%）。

items.title: Skipper: Enabling efficient SNN training through activation-checkpointing and time-skipping.
items.abstract: Spiking neural networks (SNNs) are a highly efficient signal processing mechanism in biological systems that have inspired a plethora of research efforts aimed at translating their energy efficiency to computational platforms. Efficient training approaches are critical for the successful deployment of SNNs. Compared to mainstream deep neural networks (ANNs), training SNNs is far more challenging due to complex neural dynamics that evolve with time and their discrete, binary computing paradigm. Back-propagation-through-time (BPTT) with surrogate gradients has recently emerged as an effective technique to train deep SNNs directly. SNN-BPTT, however, has a major drawback in that it has a high memory requirement that increases with the number of timesteps. SNNs generally result from the discretization of Ordinary Differential Equations, due to which the sequence length must be typically longer than RNNs, compounding the time dependence problem. It, therefore, becomes hard to train deep SNNs on a single or multi-GPU setup with sufficiently large batch sizes or timesteps, and extended periods of training are required to achieve reasonable network performance. In this work, we reduce the memory requirements of BPTT in SNNs to enable the training of deeper SNNs with more timesteps (T). For this, we leverage the notion of activation re-computation in the context of SNN training that enables the GPU memory to scale sub-linearly with increasing time-steps. We observe that naively deploying the re-computation based approach leads to a considerable computational overhead. To solve this, we propose a time-skipped BPTT approximation technique, called Skipper, for SNNs, that not only alleviates this computation overhead, but also lowers memory consumption further with little to no loss of accuracy. We show the efficacy of our proposed technique by comparing it against a popular method for memory footprint reduction during training. Our evaluations on 5 state-of-the-art networks and 4 datasets show that for a constant batch size and time-steps, skipper reduces memory usage by 3.3× to 8.4× (6.7× on average) over baseline SNN-BPTT. It also achieves a speedup of 29% to 70% over the checkpointed approach and of 4% to 40% over the baseline approach. For a constant memory budget, skipper can scale to an order of magnitude higher timesteps compared to baseline SNN-BPTT.
items.abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 是生物系统中一种高效的信号处理机制，激发了大量旨在将其能源效率转化为计算平台的研究工作。有效的训练方法对于 SNN 的成功部署至关重要。与主流深度神经网络 (ANN) 相比，由于随时间演变的复杂神经动力学及其离散的二进制计算范式，训练 SNN 更具挑战性。具有代理梯度的时间反向传播 (BPTT) 最近已成为直接训练深度 SNN 的有效技术。然而，SNN-BPTT 有一个主要缺点，即它的内存需求随着时间步数的增加而增加。 SNN 通常由常微分方程的离散化产生，因此序列长度通常必须比 RNN 长，从而加剧了时间依赖性问题。因此，在具有足够大的批量大小或时间步长的单或多 GPU 设置上训练深度 SNN 变得很困难，并且需要延长训练时间才能实现合理的网络性能。在这项工作中，我们减少了 SNN 中 BPTT 的内存需求，以便能够使用更多时间步 (T) 训练更深的 SNN。为此，我们在 SNN 训练的背景下利用激活重新计算的概念，使 GPU 内存能够随着时间步长的增加而实现亚线性扩展。我们观察到，天真地部署基于重新计算的方法会导致相当大的计算开销。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种用于 SNN 的时间跳跃 BPTT 近似技术，称为 Skipper，它不仅减轻了这种计算开销，而且还进一步降低了内存消耗，而几乎没有损失精度。我们通过将其与训练期间减少内存占用的流行方法进行比较来展示我们提出的技术的有效性。我们对 5 个最先进的网络和 4 个数据集的评估表明，对于恒定的批量大小和时间步长，Skipper 比基线 SNN-BPTT 减少了 3.3 倍到 8.4 倍（平均 6.7 倍）的内存使用量。与检查点方法相比，它的速度提高了 29% 到 70%，与基线方法相比，速度提高了 4% 到 40%。对于恒定的内存预算，与基线 SNN-BPTT 相比，Skipper 可以扩展到高一个数量级的时间步长。

items.title: Scaling Superconducting Quantum Computers with Chiplet Architectures.
items.abstract: Fixed-frequency transmon quantum computers (QCs) have advanced in coherence times, addressability, and gate fidelities. Unfortunately, these devices are restricted by the number of on-chip qubits, capping processing power and slowing progress toward fault-tolerance. Although emerging transmon devices feature over 100 qubits, building QCs large enough for meaningful demonstrations of quantum advantage requires overcoming many design challenges. For example, today’s transmon qubits suffer from significant variation due to limited precision in fabrication. As a result, barring significant improvements in current fabrication techniques, scaling QCs by building ever larger individual chips with more qubits is hampered by device variation. Severe device variation that degrades QC performance is referred to as a defect. Here, we focus on a specific defect known as a frequency collision. When transmon frequencies collide, their difference falls within a range that limits two-qubit gate fidelity. Frequency collisions occur with greater probability on larger QCs, causing collision-free yields to decline as the number of on-chip qubits increases. As a solution, we propose exploiting the higher yields associated with smaller QCs by integrating quantum chiplets within quantum multi-chip modules (MCMs). Yield, gate performance, and application-based analysis show the feasibility of QC scaling through modularity. Our results demonstrate that chiplet architectures, relative to monolithic designs, benefit from average yield improvements ranging from 9.6 – 92.6 × for ≲5 qubit machines. In addition, our simulations explore the design space of chiplet systems and discover configurations that demonstrate average two-qubit gate infidelity reductions that are at best 0.815 × their monolithic counterpart. Finally, we observe that carefully-selected modular systems achieve fidelity improvements on a range of benchmark circuits.
items.abstract_zh: 固定频率传输量子计算机 (QC) 在相干时间、可寻址性和门保真度方面取得了进步。不幸的是，这些设备受到片上量子位数量的限制，限制了处理能力并减缓了容错的进展。尽管新兴的 transmon 设备具有超过 100 个量子位，但构建足够大的 QC 来有意义地展示量子优势需要克服许多设计挑战。例如，由于制造精度有限，当今的传输量子比特存在显着变化。因此，除非当前制造技术得到显着改进，否则通过构建具有更多量子位的更大的单个芯片来扩展质量控制会受到设备变化的阻碍。降低 QC 性能的严重设备变异称为缺陷。在这里，我们重点关注一种称为频率冲突的特定缺陷。当传输频率发生冲突时，它们的差异会落在限制两个量子位门保真度的范围内。在较大的 QC 上发生频率冲突的可能性更大，导致无冲突产量随着片上量子位数量的增加而下降。作为解决方案，我们建议通过将量子小芯片集成到量子多芯片模块 (MCM) 中来利用与较小 QC 相关的更高产量。产量、门性能和基于应用的分析显示了通过模块化进行 QC 扩展的可行性。我们的结果表明，相对于单片设计，小芯片架构受益于 ≲5 量子位机器的 9.6 – 92.6 × 平均良率改进。此外，我们的模拟探索了小芯片系统的设计空间，并发现了能够证明平均双量子位门不保真度减少最多为单片系统的 0.815 倍的配置。最后，我们观察到精心挑选的模块化系统在一系列基准电路上实现了保真度改进。

items.title: RemembERR: Leveraging Microprocessor Errata for Design Testing and Validation.
items.abstract: Microprocessors are constantly increasing in complexity, but to remain competitive, their design and testing cycles must be kept as short as possible. This trend inevitably leads to design errors that eventually make their way into commercial products. Major microprocessor vendors such as Intel and AMD regularly publish and update errata documents describing these errata after their microprocessors are launched. The abundance of errata suggests the presence of significant gaps in the design testing of modern microprocessors. We argue that while a specific erratum provides information about only a single issue, the aggregated information from the body of existing errata can shed light on existing design testing gaps. Unfortunately, errata documents are not systematically structured. We formalize that each erratum describes, in human language, a set of triggers that, when applied in specific contexts, cause certain observations that pertain to a particular bug. We present RemembERR, the first large-scale database of microprocessor errata collected among all Intel Core and AMD microprocessors since 2008, comprising 2,563 individual errata. Each RemembERR entry is annotated with triggers, contexts, and observations, extracted from the original erratum.
