To generalize these properties, we classify them on multiple levels of abstraction that describe the underlying causes and effects. We then leverage RemembERR to study gaps in design testing by making the key observation that triggers are conjunctive, while observations are disjunctive: to detect a bug, it is necessary to apply all triggers and sufficient to observe only a single deviation. Based on this insight, one can rely on partial information about triggers across the entire corpus to draw consistent conclusions about the best design testing and validation strategies to cover the existing gaps. As a concrete example, our study shows that we need testing tools that exert power level transitions under MSR-determined configurations while operating custom features.
items.abstract_zh: 微处理器的复杂性不断增加，但为了保持竞争力，其设计和测试周期必须尽可能短。这种趋势不可避免地会导致设计错误，并最终进入商业产品。 Intel 和 AMD 等主要微处理器供应商在其微处理器推出后会定期发布和更新勘误表文档，描述这些勘误表。大量勘误表表明现代微处理器的设计测试中存在重大差距。我们认为，虽然特定勘误表仅提供有关单个问题的信息，但现有勘误表主体的汇总信息可以揭示现有设计测试差距。不幸的是，勘误表文档的结构并不系统。我们将每个勘误表用人类语言形式化地描述了一组触发器，这些触发器在应用于特定上下文时会导致与特定错误相关的某些观察结果。我们推出 RemembERR，这是自 2008 年以来在所有 Intel Core 和 AMD 微处理器中收集的第一个大型微处理器勘误表数据库，其中包含 2,563 个单独的勘误表。每个 RemembERR 条目都注释有从原始勘误表中提取的触发器、上下文和观察结果。为了概括这些属性，我们将它们分类为多个抽象级别，描述潜在的原因和影响。然后，我们利用 RemembERR 来研究设计测试中的差距，方法是进行关键观察，即触发器是连接性的，而观察是分离性的：要检测错误，有必要应用所有触发器，并且足以仅观察到单个偏差。基于这一见解，人们可以依靠整个语料库中有关触发器的部分信息，就最佳设计测试和验证策略得出一致的结论，以弥补现有的差距。作为一个具体的例子，我们的研究表明，我们需要测试工具，在操作自定义功能的同时，在 MSR 确定的配置下施加功率电平转换。

items.title: Q3DE: A fault-tolerant quantum computer architecture for multi-bit burst errors by cosmic rays.
items.abstract: Demonstrating small error rates by integrating quantum error correction (QEC) into an architecture of quantum computing is the next milestone towards scalable fault-tolerant quantum computing (FTQC). Encoding logical qubits with superconducting qubits and surface codes is considered a promising candidate for FTQC architectures. In this paper, we propose an FTQC architecture, which we call Q3DE, that enhances the tolerance to multi-bit burst errors (MBBEs) by cosmic rays with moderate changes and overhead. There are three core components in Q3DE: in-situ anomaly DEtection, dynamic code DEformation, and optimized error DEcoding. In this architecture, MBBEs are detected only from syndrome values for error correction. The effect of MBBEs is immediately mitigated by dynamically increasing the encoding level of logical qubits and re-estimating probable recovery operation with the rollback of the decoding process. We investigate the performance and overhead of the Q3DE architecture with quantum-error simulators and demonstrate that Q3DE effectively reduces the period of MBBEs by 1000 times and halves the size of their region. Therefore, Q3DE significantly relaxes the requirement of qubit density and qubit chip size to realize FTQC. Our scheme is versatile for mitigating MBBEs, i.e., temporal variations of error properties, on a wide range of physical devices and FTQC architectures since it relies only on the standard features of topological stabilizer codes.
items.abstract_zh: 通过将量子纠错（QEC）集成到量子计算架构中来展示小错误率是可扩展容错量子计算（FTQC）的下一个里程碑。使用超导量子位和表面代码编码逻辑量子位被认为是 FTQC 架构的有前途的候选者。在本文中，我们提出了一种 FTQC 架构，我们称之为 Q3DE，该架构增强了对具有适度变化和开销的宇宙射线造成的多位突发错误（MBBE）的容忍度。 Q3DE 包含三个核心组件：原位异常检测、动态代码 DEformation 和优化错误解码。在此架构中，仅根据校正子值检测 MBBE 以进行纠错。通过动态增加逻辑量子位的编码级别并通过解码过程的回滚重新估计可能的恢复操作，可以立即减轻 MBBE 的影响。我们使用量子误差模拟器研究了 Q3DE 架构的性能和开销，并证明 Q3DE 有效地将 MBBE 的周期缩短了 1000 倍，并将其区域大小减半。因此，Q3DE显着放宽了实现FTQC对量子位密度和量子位芯片尺寸的要求。我们的方案对于减轻各种物理设备和 FTQC 架构上的 MBBE（即错误属性的时间变化）具有通用性，因为它仅依赖于拓扑稳定器代码的标准功能。

items.title: big.VLITTLE: On-Demand Data-Parallel Acceleration for Mobile Systems on Chip.
items.abstract: Single-ISA heterogeneous multi-core architectures offer a compelling high-performance and high-efficiency solution to executing task-parallel workloads in mobile systems on chip (SoCs). In addition to task-parallel workloads, many data-parallel applications, such as machine learning, computer vision, and data analytics, increasingly run on mobile SoCs to provide real-time user interactions. Next-generation scalable vector architectures, such as the RISC-V Vector Extension and Arm SVE, have recently emerged as unified vector abstractions for both large- and small-scale systems. In this paper, we propose novel area-efficient high-performance architectures called big.VLITTLE that support next-generation vector architectures to efficiently accelerate data-parallel workloads in conventional big.LITTLE systems. big.VLITTLE architectures reconFigure multiple little cores on demand to work as a decoupled vector engine when executing data-parallel workloads. Our results show that a big.VLITTLE system can achieve $1.6\times$ performance speedup over an area-comparable big.LITTLE system equipped with an integrated vector unit across multiple data-parallel applications and $1.7\times$ speedup compared to an aggressive decoupled vector engine for task-parallel workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 单 ISA 异构多核架构为在移动片上系统 (SoC) 中执行任务并行工作负载提供了引人注目的高性能和高效率解决方案。除了任务并行工作负载之外，许多数据并行应用程序（例如机器学习、计算机视觉和数据分析）越来越多地在移动 SoC 上运行，以提供实时用户交互。下一代可扩展矢量架构（例如 RISC-V 矢量扩展和 Arm SVE）最近作为大型和小型系统的统一矢量抽象而出现。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 big.VLITTLE 的新颖的区域高效高性能架构，它支持下一代矢量架构，以有效加速传统 big.LITTLE 系统中的数据并行工作负载。 big.VLITTLE 架构在执行数据并行工作负载时按需重新配置多个小核心，作为解耦矢量引擎。我们的结果表明，与配备跨多个数据并行应用程序的集成矢量单元的同等面积的 big.LITTLE 系统相比，big.VLITTLE 系统可实现 1.6 美元的性能加速，与用于任务并行工作负载的激进解耦矢量引擎相比，可实现 1.7 倍的性能加速。

items.title: Mint: An Accelerator For Mining Temporal Motifs.
items.abstract: A variety of complex systems, including social and communication networks, financial markets, biology, and neuroscience are modeled using temporal graphs that contain a set of nodes and directed timestamped edges. Temporal motifs in temporal graphs are generalized from subgraph patterns in static graphs in that they also account for edge ordering and time duration, in addition to the graph structure. Mining temporal motifs is a fundamental problem used in several application domains. However, existing software frameworks offer suboptimal performance due to high algorithmic complexity and irregular memory accesses of temporal motif mining.This paper presents $\mathsf{Mint}$—a novel accelerator architecture and a programming model for mining temporal motifs efficiently. We first divide this workload into three fundamental tasks: search, book-keeping, and backtracking. Based on this, we propose a task-centric programming model that enables decoupled, asynchronous execution. This model unlocks massive opportunities for parallelism, and allows storing task context information on-chip. To best utilize the proposed programming model, we design a domain-specific hardware accelerator using its data path and memory subsystem design to cater to the unique workload characteristics of temporal motif mining. To further improve performance, we propose a novel optimization called search index memoization that significantly reduces memory traffic. We comprehensively compare the performance of $\mathsf{Mint}$ with state-of-the-art temporal motif mining software frameworks (both approximate and exact) running on both CPU and GPU, and show $9\times-2576\times$ benefit in performance.
items.abstract_zh: 各种复杂系统，包括社交和通信网络、金融市场、生物学和神经科学，都使用包含一组节点和有向时间戳边的时间图进行建模。时间图中的时间主题是从静态图中的子图模式概括而来的，因为除了图结构之外，它们还考虑了边排序和持续时间。挖掘时间主题是多个应用领域中使用的一个基本问题。然而，由于时间主题挖掘的高算法复杂性和不规则的内存访问，现有的软件框架提供了次优的性能。本文提出了$\mathsf{Mint}$——一种新颖的加速器架构和用于有效挖掘时间主题的编程模型。我们首先将此工作量分为三个基本任务：搜索、簿记和回溯。基于此，我们提出了一种以任务为中心的编程模型，可以实现解耦、异步执行。该模型释放了巨大的并行机会，并允许在芯片上存储任务上下文信息。为了最好地利用所提出的编程模型，我们使用其数据路径和内存子系统设计设计了一个特定于领域的硬件加速器，以满足时间主题挖掘的独特工作负载特征。为了进一步提高性能，我们提出了一种称为搜索索引记忆的新颖优化，可以显着减少内存流量。我们全面比较了 $\mathsf{Mint}$ 与在 CPU 和 GPU 上运行的最先进的时间主题挖掘软件框架（近似的和精确的）的性能，并显示了 $9\times-2576\times$ 的性能优势。

items.title: HARMONY: Heterogeneity-Aware Hierarchical Management for Federated Learning System.
items.abstract: Federated learning (FL) enables multiple devices to collaboratively train a shared model while preserving data privacy. However, despite its emerging applications in many areas, real-world deployment of on-device FL is challenging due to wildly diverse training capability and data distribution across heterogeneous edge devices, which highly impact both model performance and training efficiency. This paper proposes Harmony, a high-performance FL framework with heterogeneity-aware hierarchical management of training devices and training data. Unlike previous work that mainly focuses on heterogeneity in either training capability or data distribution, Harmony adopts a hierarchical structure to jointly handle both heterogeneities in a unified manner. Specifically, the two core components of Harmony are a global coordinator hosted by the central server and a local coordinator deployed on each participating device. Without accessing the raw data, the global coordinator first selects the participants, and then further reorganizes their training samples based on the accurate estimation of the runtime training capability and data distribution of each device. The local coordinator keeps monitoring the local training status and conducts efficient training with guidance from the global coordinator. We conduct extensive experiments to evaluate Harmony using both hardware and simulation testbeds on representative datasets. The experimental results show that Harmony improves the accuracy performance by 1.67% - 27.62%. In addition, Harmony effectively accelerates the training process up to $3.29\times$ and $1.84\times$ on average, and saves energy up to 88.41% and 28.04% on average.
items.abstract_zh: 联合学习 (FL) 使多个设备能够协作训练共享模型，同时保护数据隐私。然而，尽管其在许多领域都有新兴应用，但由于异构边缘设备上的训练能力和数据分布千差万别，设备端 FL 的实际部署仍面临挑战，这极大地影响了模型性能和训练效率。本文提出了 Harmony，这是一种高性能 FL 框架，具有对训练设备和训练数据进行异构感知的分层管理。与之前的工作主要关注训练能力或数据分布的异构性不同，Harmony 采用分层结构以统一的方式共同处理这两种异构性。具体来说，Harmony 的两个核心组件是由中央服务器托管的全局协调器和部署在每个参与设备上的本地协调器。在不访问原始数据的情况下，全局协调器首先选择参与者，然后根据对每个设备的运行时训练能力和数据分布的准确估计，进一步重新组织他们的训练样本。当地协调员持续监控当地培训状况，并在全球协调员的指导下进行高效的培训。我们使用硬件和模拟测试平台对代表性数据集进行了大量实验来评估 Harmony。实验结果表明，Harmony 将准确率性能提高了 1.67% - 27.62%。此外，Harmony 有效地将训练过程平均加速高达 $3.29\times$ 和 $1.84\times$，平均节省能源高达 88.41% 和 28.04%。

items.title: Page Size Aware Cache Prefetching.
items.abstract: The increase in working set sizes of contemporary applications outpaces the growth in cache sizes, resulting in frequent main memory accesses that deteriorate system performance due to the disparity between processor and memory speeds. Prefetching data blocks into the cache hierarchy ahead of demand accesses has proven successful at attenuating this bottleneck. However, spatial cache prefetchers operating in the physical address space leave significant performance on the table by limiting their pattern detection within 4KB physical page boundaries when modern systems use page sizes larger than 4KB to mitigate the address translation overheads. This paper exploits the high usage of large pages in modern systems to increase the effectiveness of spatial cache prefetching. We design and propose the Page-size Propagation Module (PPM), a $\mu$architectural scheme that propagates the page size information to the lower-level cache prefetchers, enabling safe prefetching beyond 4KB physical page boundaries when the accessed blocks reside in large pages, at the cost of augmenting the first-level caches’ Miss Status Holding Register (MSHR) entries with one additional bit. PPM is compatible with any cache prefetcher without implying design modifications. We capitalize on PPM’s benefits by designing a module that consists of two page size aware prefetchers that inherently use different page sizes to drive prefetching. The composite module uses adaptive logic to dynamically enable the most appropriate page size aware prefetcher. Finally, we show that the proposed designs are transparent to which cache prefetcher is used. We apply the proposed page size exploitation techniques to four state-of-the-art spatial cache prefetchers. Our evaluation shows that our proposals improve single-core geomean performance by up to 8.1% (2.1% at minimum) over the original implementation of the considered prefetchers, across 80 memory-intensive workloads. In multi-core contexts, we report geomean speedups up to 7.7% across different cache prefetchers and core configurations.
items.abstract_zh: 当代应用程序工作集大小的增长超过了缓存大小的增长，导致频繁的主内存访问，由于处理器和内存速度之间的差异而降低了系统性能。 Prefetching data blocks into the cache hierarchy ahead of demand accesses has proven successful at attenuating this bottleneck.然而，当现代系统使用大于 4KB 的页面大小来减轻地址转换开销时，在物理地址空间中运行的空间缓存预取器将其模式检测限制在 4KB 物理页面边界内，从而在表上留下了显着的性能。 This paper exploits the high usage of large pages in modern systems to increase the effectiveness of spatial cache prefetching.我们设计并提出了页面大小传播模块（PPM），这是一种将页面大小信息传播到较低级别缓存预取器的架构方案，当访问的块驻留在大页面中时，可以安全地预取超出 4KB 物理页面边界的内容，但代价是增加了一级缓存的未命中状态保持寄存器（MSHR）条目。 PPM is compatible with any cache prefetcher without implying design modifications.我们通过设计一个由两个页面大小感知预取器组成的模块来利用 PPM 的优势，这两个预取器本质上使用不同的页面大小来驱动预取。 The composite module uses adaptive logic to dynamically enable the most appropriate page size aware prefetcher. Finally, we show that the proposed designs are transparent to which cache prefetcher is used. We apply the proposed page size exploitation techniques to four state-of-the-art spatial cache prefetchers.我们的评估表明，与所考虑的预取器的原始实现相比，我们的建议在 80 个内存密集型工作负载中将单核 geomean 性能提高了高达 8.1%（至少 2.1%）。 In multi-core contexts, we report geomean speedups up to 7.7% across different cache prefetchers and core configurations.

items.title: Patching up Network Data Leaks with Sweeper.
items.abstract: Datacenters have witnessed a staggering evolution in networking technologies, driven by insatiable application demands for larger datasets and inter-server data transfers. Modern NICs can already handle 100s of Gbps of traffic, a bandwidth capability equivalent to several memory channels. Direct Cache Access mechanisms like DDIO that contain network traffic inside the CPU’s caches are therefore essential to effectively handle growing network traffic rates. However, a growing body of work reveals instances of a critical DDIO weakness known as “leaky DMA”, occurring when a significant fraction of network traffic leaks from the CPU’s caches to memory. We find that such network data leaks cap the network bandwidth a server can effectively utilize. We identify that a major culprit for such network data leaks are evictions of already consumed dirty network buffers. Our key insight is that buffers already consumed by the application typically need not be written back to memory, as their next reuse will be a full overwrite with new network data by the NIC. We introduce Sweeper, a hardware extension and API that allows applications to mark such consumed network buffers. Hardware then skips writing marked buffers back to memory, drastically reducing memory bandwidth consumption and mitigating the performance penalty of network data leaks. Sweeper boosts a 24-core server’s peak sustainable network bandwidth by up to $2. 6 \times $ as compared to DDIO-based configurations.
items.abstract_zh: 在对更大数据集和服务器间数据传输的永不满足的应用需求的推动下，数据中心见证了网络技术的惊人发展。 Modern NICs can already handle 100s of Gbps of traffic, a bandwidth capability equivalent to several memory channels.因此，像 DDIO 这样将网络流量包含在 CPU 缓存内的直接缓存访问机制对于有效处理不断增长的网络流量至关重要。然而，越来越多的工作揭示了被称为“泄漏 DMA”的关键 DDIO 弱点的实例，当很大一部分网络流量从 CPU 缓存泄漏到内存时就会发生这种情况。 We find that such network data leaks cap the network bandwidth a server can effectively utilize. We identify that a major culprit for such network data leaks are evictions of already consumed dirty network buffers.我们的主要见解是，应用程序已消耗的缓冲区通常不需要写回内存，因为它们的下一次重用将是由 NIC 用新的网络数据完全覆盖。 We introduce Sweeper, a hardware extension and API that allows applications to mark such consumed network buffers.然后，硬件会跳过将标记的缓冲区写回内存，从而大大减少内存带宽消耗并减轻网络数据泄漏的性能损失。 Sweeper boosts a 24-core server’s peak sustainable network bandwidth by up to $2. 6 \times $ as compared to DDIO-based configurations.

items.title: A Data-Centric Accelerator for High-Performance Hypergraph Processing.
items.abstract: Hypergraph processing has emerged as a powerful approach for analyzing complex multilateral relationships among multiple entities. Past research on building hypergraph systems suggests that changing the scheduling order of bipartite edge tasks can improve the overlap-induced data locality in hypergraph processing. However, due to the complex intertwined connections between vertices and hyperedges, it is almost impossible to find a locality-optimal scheduling order. Thus, these task-centric hypergraph systems often suffer from substantial off-chip communications. In this paper, we first propose a novel data-centric Load-Trigger-Reduce (LTR) execution model to exploit fully the locality in hypergraph processing. Unlike a task-centric model that loads the required data along with a task, our LTR model invokes tasks as per the data used. Specifically, once the hypergraph data is loaded into the on-chip memory, all of its relevant computation tasks will be triggered simultaneously to output intermediate results, which are finally reduced to update the final results. Our LTR model enables all hypergraph data to be accessed once in each iteration. To fully exploit the LTR performance potential, we further architect an LTR-driven hypergraph accelerator, XuLin, which features with an adaptive data loading mechanism to minimize the loading cost via chunk merging at runtime. XuLin is also equipped with a priority-based differential data reduction scheme to reduce the impact of conflicting updates on performance. We have implemented XuLin both on a Xilinx Alveo U250 FPGA card and using a cycle-accurate simulator. The results show that XuLin outperforms the state-of-the-art hypergraph processing solutions Hygra and ChGraph by $20.47 \times$ and $8.77 \times$ on average, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 超图处理已成为分析多个实体之间复杂多边关系的强大方法。过去关于构建超图系统的研究表明，改变二分边缘任务的调度顺序可以改善超图处理中重叠引起的数据局部性。然而，由于顶点和超边之间复杂的交织连接，几乎不可能找到局部最优的调度顺序。因此，这些以任务为中心的超图系统经常遭受大量的片外通信的困扰。在本文中，我们首先提出了一种新颖的以数据为中心的负载触发减少（LTR）执行模型，以充分利用超图处理中的局部性。与随任务一起加载所需数据的以任务为中心的模型不同，我们的 LTR 模型根据所使用的数据调用任务。具体来说，一旦超图数据被加载到片上存储器中，所有相关的计算任务将同时触发，输出中间结果，最后进行缩减以更新最终结果。我们的 LTR 模型使所有超图数据能够在每次迭代中访问一次。为了充分利用 LTR 的性能潜力，我们进一步构建了一个 LTR 驱动的超图加速器 XuLin，它具有自适应数据加载机制，可通过运行时的块合并来最小化加载成本。 XuLin还配备了基于优先级的差异数据缩减方案，以减少冲突更新对性能的影响。我们在 Xilinx Alveo U250 FPGA 卡上并使用周期精确模拟器实现了 XuLin。结果表明，XuLin 的性能平均分别优于最先进的超图处理解决方案 Hygra 和 ChGraph 20.47 美元和 8.77 美元。

items.title: XPGraph: XPline-Friendly Persistent Memory Graph Stores for Large-Scale Evolving Graphs.
items.abstract: Traditional in-memory graph storage systems have limited scalability due to the limited capacity and volatility of DRAM. Emerging persistent memory (PMEM), with large capacity and non-volatility, provides us an opportunity to realize the scalable and high-performance graph stores. However, directly moving existing DRAM-based graph storage systems to PMEM would cause serious PMEM access inefficiency issues, including high read and write amplification in PMEM and costly remote PMEM accesses across NUMA nodes, thus leading to the performance bottleneck. In this paper, we propose XPGraph, a PMEM-based graph storage system for managing large-scale evolving graphs, by developing an XPLine-friendly graph access model with vertex-centric graph buffering, hierarchical vertex buffer managing, and NUMA-friendly graph accessing. Experimental results show that XPGraph achieves 3.01× to 3.95× higher update performance and up to 4.46× higher query performance, compared with the state-of-the-art in-memory graph storage system implemented on a PMEM-based system.
items.abstract_zh: 由于 DRAM 的容量和易失性有限，传统内存图存储系统的可扩展性有限。新兴持久内存（PMEM）具有大容量和非易失性，为我们提供了实现可扩展和高性能图存储的机会。然而，直接将现有的基于 DRAM 的图存储系统迁移到 PMEM 会导致严重的 PMEM 访问低效率问题，包括 PMEM 中的高读写放大以及跨 NUMA 节点的远程 PMEM 访问成本高昂，从而导致性能瓶颈。在本文中，我们提出了 XPGraph，一种基于 PMEM 的图存储系统，用于管理大规模演化图，通过开发具有以顶点为中心的图缓冲、分层顶点缓冲区管理和 NUMA 友好的图访问的 XPLine 友好的图访问模型。实验结果表明，与基于 PMEM 的系统上实现的最先进的内存图存储系统相比，XPGraph 的更新性能提高了 3.01 倍至 3.95 倍，查询性能提高了 4.46 倍。

items.title: Eager Memory Cryptography in Caches.
items.abstract: To protect memory values from adversaries with physical access to data centers, secure memory systems ensure memory confidentiality and integrity via memory encryption and verification. The corresponding cryptography calculations require a memory block’s write counter as input. As such, CPUs today cache counters in the memory controller (MC). Due to the large memory footprint and irregular access patterns of many real-world applications, MC’s counter cache is too small to achieve high hit rate. A promising solution is also caching counters in the much bigger Last Level cache (LLC). As such, many prior works use LLC as a second level cache for counters to back up the smaller counter cache in MC. Caching counters in LLC introduces a new problem, however. Modern server CPUs have a long LLC access latency that not only can diminish the benefit of caching counters in LLC, but also can sometimes significantly increase counter access latency compared to not caching counters in LLC. We note the problem lies with MC sitting behind LLC; due to its physical location, MC can only see LLC misses and, therefore, can only serially access and use counters after data miss in LLC has completed. However, prior designs without caching counters in LLC can access and use counters in parallel with accessing data. If a block’s counter misses in MC’s counter cache, MC can fetch the counter from DRAM in parallel with data; if the counter hits in MC’s counter cache, MC can use counters for cryptography calculation in parallel with data traveling from DRAM to MC. To parallelize the access and use of counters with data access while caching counters in LLC, we observe that in modern CPUs, L2 is typically the first place that caches data from DRAM (i.e., L2 and L3 are non-inclusive); as such, data from DRAM need not be decrypted and verified until they reach L2. So it is possible to offload some decryption and verification tasks from MC to L2. Since L2 sits before L3, L2 can access counter and data in parallel from L3; L2 can also use counters for cryptography calculation in parallel with data traveling from DRAM to L2, instead of just from DRAM to MC. As such, we propose caching and using counters directly in L2 and refer to this idea as Eager Memory Cryptography in Caches (EMCC). Our evaluation shows that when applied to the state-of-the-art baseline, EMCC improves performance of large and/or irregular workloads by 7%, on average.
items.abstract_zh: 为了保护内存值不被对手物理访问数据中心，安全内存系统通过内存加密和验证来确保内存的机密性和完整性。相应的密码学计算需要内存块的写入计数器作为输入。因此，如今的 CPU 在内存控制器 (MC) 中缓存计数器。由于许多实际应用程序的内存占用较大且访问模式不规则，MC 的计数器缓存太小而无法实现高命中率。一个有前途的解决方案是将计数器缓存在更大的末级缓存 (LLC) 中。因此，许多先前的工作使用 LLC 作为计数器的二级缓存来备份 MC 中较小的计数器缓存。然而，LLC 中的缓存计数器引入了一个新问题。现代服务器 CPU 具有较长的 LLC 访问延迟，这不仅会削弱 LLC 中缓存计数器的优势，而且与不缓存 LLC 中的计数器相比，有时还会显着增加计数器访问延迟。我们注意到问题在于 MC​​ 坐在 LLC 后面；由于其物理位置，MC 只能看到 LLC 缺失，因此只能在 LLC 中的数据缺失完成后才能串行访问和使用计数器。然而，在 LLC 中没有缓存计数器的现有设计可以在访问数据的同时访问和使用计数器。如果MC的计数器缓存中某个块的计数器未命中，MC可以与数据并行地从DRAM中获取计数器；如果计数器命中 MC 的计数器缓存，MC 可以使用计数器进行密码计算，同时数据从 DRAM 传输到 MC。为了将计数器的访问和使用与数据访问并行化，同时在 LLC 中缓存计数器，我们观察到在现代 CPU 中，L2 通常是缓存来自 DRAM 的数据的第一个位置（即 L2 和 L3 是非包容性的）；因此，来自 DRAM 的数据在到达 L2 之前无需解密和验证。因此可以将一些解密和验证任务从MC卸载到L2。由于L2位于L3之前，L2可以从L3并行访问计数器和数据； L2 还可以使用计数器进行密码计算，与数据从 DRAM 传输到 L2 并行，而不仅仅是从 DRAM 传输到 MC。因此，我们建议直接在 L2 中缓存和使用计数器，并将此想法称为缓存中的渴望内存加密 (EMCC)。我们的评估表明，当应用于最先进的基线时，EMCC 将大型和/或不规则工作负载的性能平均提高了 7%。

items.title: Self-Reinforcing Memoization for Cryptography Calculations in Secure Memory Systems.
items.abstract: Modern memory systems use encryption and message authentication codes to ensure confidentiality and integrity. Encryption and integrity verification rely on cryptography calculations, which are slow. To hide the latency of cryptography calculations, prior works exploit the fact that many cryptography steps only require a memory block’s write counter (i.e., a value that increases whenever the block is written to memory), but not the block itself. As such, memory controller (MC) caches counters so that MC can start calculating before missing blocks arrive from memory.Irregular workloads suffer from high counter miss rates, however, just like they suffer from high miss rates of page table entries. Many prior works have looked at the problem of page table entry misses for irregular workloads, but not the problem of counter misses for the irregular workloads.This paper addresses the memory latency overheads that irregular workloads suffer due to their high counter miss rate. We observe many (e.g., unlimited number of) counters can have the same value. As such, we propose memoizing cryptography calculations for hot counter values. When a counter arrives from memory, MC can use the counter value to look up a memoization table to quickly obtain the counter’s memoized results instead of slowly recalculating them. To maximize memoization table hit rate, we observe whenever writing a block to memory, increasing its counter to any value higher than the current counter value can satisfy the security requirement of always using different counter values to encrypt the same block. As such, we also propose a memoization-aware counter update: when writing a block to memory, increase its counter to a value whose cryptography calculation is currently memoized. We refer to memoizing the calculation results of counters and the corresponding memoization-aware counter update collectively as Self-Reinforcing Memoization for Cryptography Calculations (RMCC). Our evaluations show that RMCC improves average performance by 6% compared to the state-of-the-art. On average across the lifetimes of different workloads, RMCC accelerates decryption and verification for 92% of counter misses.
items.abstract_zh: 现代存储系统使用加密和消息验证代码来确保机密性和完整性。加密和完整性验证依赖于密码学计算，速度较慢。为了隐藏密码学计算的延迟，先前的工作利用了这样一个事实：许多密码学步骤只需要内存块的写入计数器（即，每当块写入内存时就会增加的值），而不需要块本身。因此，内存控制器 (MC) 会缓存计数器，以便 MC 可以在丢失的块从内存到达之前开始计算。然而，不规则的工作负载会遭受高计数器丢失率的影响，就像它们会遭受页表条目高丢失率的影响一样。许多先前的工作已经研究了不规则工作负载的页表条目缺失问题，但没有关注不规则工作负载的计数器缺失问题。本文解决了不规则工作负载由于其高计数器缺失率而遭受的内存延迟开销。我们观察到许多（例如，无限数量）计数器可以具有相同的值。因此，我们建议记忆热计数器值的密码学计算。当计数器从内存到达时，MC可以使用计数器值查找记忆表来快速获取计数器的记忆结果，而不是慢慢地重新计算它们。为了最大化记忆表命中率，我们观察到每当将块写入内存时，将其计数器增加到高于当前计数器值的任何值都可以满足始终使用不同计数器值来加密同一块的安全要求。因此，我们还提出了一种记忆感知计数器更新：将块写入内存时，将其计数器增加到当前已记忆密码计算的值。我们将记忆计数器的计算结果和相应的记忆感知计数器更新统称为密码学计算的自我强化记忆（RMCC）。我们的评估表明，与最先进的技术相比，RMCC 将平均性能提高了 6%。平均而言，在不同工作负载的生命周期中，RMCC 可以加速 92% 的计数器未命中的解密和验证。

items.title: Sparseloop: An Analytical Approach To Sparse Tensor Accelerator Modeling.
items.abstract: In recent years, many accelerators have been proposed to efficiently process sparse tensor algebra applications (e.g., sparse neural networks). However, these proposals are single points in a large and diverse design space. The lack of systematic description and modeling support for these sparse tensor accelerators impedes hardware designers from efficient and effective design space exploration. This paper first presents a unified taxonomy to systematically describe the diverse sparse tensor accelerator design space. Based on the proposed taxonomy, it then introduces Sparseloop, the first fast, accurate, and flexible analytical modeling framework to enable early-stage evaluation and exploration of sparse tensor accelerators. Sparseloop comprehends a large set of architecture specifications, including various dataflows and sparse acceleration features (e.g., elimination of zero-based compute). Using these specifications, Sparseloop evaluates a design’s processing speed and energy efficiency while accounting for data movement and compute incurred by the employed dataflow, including the savings and overhead introduced by the sparse acceleration features using stochastic density models. Across representative accelerator designs and workloads, Sparseloop achieves over 2000× faster modeling speed than cycle-level simulations, maintains relative performance trends, and achieves 0.1% to 8% average error. The paper also presents example use cases of Sparseloop in different accelerator design flows to reveal important design insights.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，人们提出了许多加速器来有效处理稀疏张量代数应用（例如稀疏神经网络）。然而，这些建议只是庞大而多样化的设计空间中的单点。这些稀疏张量加速器缺乏系统描述和建模支持，阻碍了硬件设计人员高效且有效的设计空间探索。本文首先提出了一个统一的分类法来系统地描述多样化的稀疏张量加速器设计空间。然后，基于所提出的分类法，介绍了 Sparseloop，这是第一个快速、准确且灵活的分析建模框架，可实现稀疏张量加速器的早期评估和探索。 Sparseloop 包含大量架构规范，包括各种数据流和稀疏加速功能（例如，消除从零开始的计算）。使用这些规范，Sparseloop 可以评估设计的处理速度和能源效率，同时考虑所使用的数据流所产生的数据移动和计算，包括使用随机密度模型的稀疏加速功能带来的节省和开销。在代表性的加速器设计和工作负载中，Sparseloop 的建模速度比周期级仿真快 2000 倍以上，保持相对性能趋势，并实现 0.1% 至 8% 的平均误差。本文还介绍了 Sparseloop 在不同加速器设计流程中的示例用例，以揭示重要的设计见解。

items.title: AutoComm: A Framework for Enabling Efficient Communication in Distributed Quantum Programs.
items.abstract: Distributed quantum computing (DQC) is a promising approach to extending the computational power of near-term quantum hardware. However, the non-local quantum communication between quantum nodes is much more expensive and error-prone than the local quantum operation within each quantum device. Previous DQC compilers focus on optimizing the implementation of each non-local gate and adopt similar compilation designs to single-node quantum compilers. The communication patterns in distributed quantum programs remain unexplored, leading to a far-from-optimal communication cost. In this paper, we identify burst communication, a specific qubit-node communication pattern that widely exists in various distributed quantum programs and can be leveraged to guide communication overhead optimization. We then propose AutoComm, an automatic compiler framework to extract burst communication patterns from input programs and then optimize the communication steps of burst communication discovered. Compared to state-of-the-art DQC compilers, experimental results show that our proposed AutoComm can reduce the communication resource consumption and the program latency by 72.9% and 69.2% on average, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 分布式量子计算（DQC）是扩展近期量子硬件计算能力的一种有前景的方法。然而，量子节点之间的非局域量子通信比每个量子设备内的局域量子操作更加昂贵且容易出错。之前的DQC编译器专注于优化每个非局域门的实现，并采用与单节点量子编译器类似的编译设计。分布式量子程序中的通信模式仍未被探索，导致通信成本远非最优。在本文中，我们确定了突发通信，这是一种广泛存在于各种分布式量子程序中的特定量子位节点通信模式，可用于指导通信开销优化。然后，我们提出了 AutoComm，一个自动编译器框架，用于从输入程序中提取突发通信模式，然后优化发现的突发通信的通信步骤。与最先进的 DQC 编译器相比，实验结果表明，我们提出的 AutoComm 可以平均减少通信资源消耗和程序延迟 72.9% 和 69.2%。

items.title: Towards Developing High Performance RISC-V Processors Using Agile Methodology.
items.abstract: While research has shown that the agile chip design methodology is promising to sustain the scaling of computing performance in a more efficient way, it is still of limited usage in actual applications due to two major obstacles: 1) Lack of tool-chain and developing framework supporting agile chip design, especially for large-scale modern processors. 2) The conventional verification methods are less agile and become a major bottleneck of the entire process. To tackle both issues, we propose MINJIE, an open-source platform supporting agile processor development flow. MINJIE integrates a broad set of tools for logic design, functional verification, performance modelling, pre-silicon validation and debugging for better development efficiency of state-of-the-art processor designs. We demonstrate the usage and effectiveness of MINJIE by building two generations of an open-source superscalar out-of-order RISC-V processor code-named XIANGSHAN using agile methodologies. We quantify the performance of XIANGSHAN using SPEC CPU2006 benchmarks and demonstrate that XIANGSHAN achieves industry-competitive performance.
items.abstract_zh: 虽然研究表明敏捷芯片设计方法有望以更有效的方式维持计算性能的扩展，但由于两个主要障碍，它在实际应用中的使用仍然有限：1）缺乏支持敏捷芯片设计的工具链和开发框架，特别是对于大规模现代处理器。 2）传统的验证方法敏捷性较差，成为整个流程的主要瓶颈。为了解决这两个问题，我们提出了 MINJIE，一个支持敏捷处理器开发流程的开源平台。 MINJIE 集成了一系列用于逻辑设计、功能验证、性能建模、硅前验证和调试的工具，以提高最先进处理器设计的开发效率。我们通过使用敏捷方法构建两代开源超标量乱序 RISC-V 处理器（代号 XIANGSHAN）来展示 MINJIE 的用法和有效性。我们使用 SPEC CPU2006 基准测试来量化象山的性能，并证明象山实现了具有行业竞争力的性能。

items.title: HiRA: Hidden Row Activation for Reducing Refresh Latency of Off-the-Shelf DRAM Chips.
items.abstract: DRAM is the building block of modern main memory systems. DRAM cells must be periodically refreshed to prevent data loss. Refresh operations degrade system performance by interfering with memory accesses. As DRAM chip density increases with technology node scaling, refresh operations also increase be-cause: 1) the number of DRAM rows in a chip increases; and 2) DRAM cells need additional refresh operations to mitigate bit failures caused by RowHammer, a failure mechanism that becomes worse with technology node scaling. Thus, it is critical to enable refresh operations at low performance overhead. To this end, we propose a new operation, Hidden Row Activation (HiRA), and the HiRA Memory Controller (HiRA-MC) to perform HiRA operations. HiRA hides a refresh operation’s latency by refreshing a row concurrently with accessing or refreshing another row within the same bank. Unlike prior works, HiRA achieves this parallelism without any modifications to off-the-shelf DRAM chips. To do so, it leverages the new observation that two rows in the same bank can be activated without data loss if the rows are connected to different charge restoration circuitry. We experimentally demonstrate on 56 real off-the-shelf DRAM chips that HiRA can reliably parallelize a DRAM row’s refresh operation with refresh or activation of any of the 32% of the rows within the same bank. By doing so, HiRA reduces the overall latency of two refresh operations by 51.4%. HiRA-MC modifies the memory request scheduler to perform HiRA when a refresh operation can be performed concurrently with a memory access or another refresh. Our system-level evaluations show that HiRA-MC increases system performance by 12.6% and $3.73\times$ as it reduces the performance degradation due to periodic refreshes and refreshes for RowHammer protection (preventive refreshes), respectively, for future DRAM chips with increased density and RowHammer vulnerability.
items.abstract_zh: DRAM 是现代主存储系统的构建模块。 DRAM 单元必须定期刷新以防止数据丢失。刷新操作会干扰内存访问，从而降低系统性能。随着 DRAM 芯片密度随着技术节点的扩展而增加，刷新操作也会增加，因为： 1) 芯片中 DRAM 行的数量增加； 2) DRAM 单元需要额外的刷新操作来减轻 RowHammer 引起的位故障，这种故障机制随着技术节点扩展而变得更糟。因此，以低性能开销启用刷新操作至关重要。为此，我们提出了一种新操作：隐藏行激活（HiRA），以及 HiRA 内存控制器（HiRA-MC）来执行 HiRA 操作。 HiRA 通过在访问或刷新同一存储体中的另一行的同时刷新行来隐藏刷新操作的延迟。与之前的工作不同，HiRA 无需对现成的 DRAM 芯片进行任何修改即可实现这种并行性。为此，它利用了新的观察结果，即如果同一组中的两行连接到不同的电荷恢复电路，则可以激活同一组中的两行而不会丢失数据。我们在 56 个真实的现成 DRAM 芯片上进行实验证明，HiRA 可以可靠地并行化 DRAM 行的刷新操作，刷新或激活同一存储体中 32% 的行中的任何行。通过这样做，HiRA 将两次刷新操作的总体延迟降低了 51.4%。 HiRA-MC 修改内存请求调度程序，以便在刷新操作可以与内存访问或其他刷新同时执行时执行 HiRA。我们的系统级评估表明，HiRA-MC 将系统性能提高了 12.6% 和 3.73 美元，因为它分别减少了由于定期刷新和 RowHammer 保护刷新（预防性刷新）而导致的性能下降，针对未来密度增加和 RowHammer 漏洞的 DRAM 芯片。

items.title: Sparse Attention Acceleration with Synergistic In-Memory Pruning and On-Chip Recomputation.
items.abstract: As its core computation, a self-attention mechanism gauges pairwise correlations across the entire input sequence. Despite favorable performance, calculating pairwise correlations is prohibitively costly. While recent work has shown the benefits of runtime pruning of elements with low attention scores, the quadratic complexity of self-attention mechanisms and their on-chip memory capacity demands are overlooked. This work addresses these constraints by architecting an accelerator, called SPRINT<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>, which leverages the inherent parallelism of ReRAM crossbar arrays to compute attention scores in an approximate manner. Our design prunes the low attention scores using a lightweight analog thresholding circuitry within ReRAM, enabling SPRINT to fetch only a small subset of relevant data to on-chip memory. To mitigate potential negative repercussions for model accuracy, SPRINT re-computes the attention scores for the few fetched data in digital. The combined in-memory pruning and on-chip recompute of the relevant attention scores enables SPRINT to transform quadratic complexity to a merely linear one. In addition, we identify and leverage a dynamic spatial locality between the adjacent attention operations even after pruning, which eliminates costly yet redundant data fetches. We evaluate our proposed technique on a wide range of state-of-the-art transformer models. On average, SPRINT yields 7.5× speedup and 19.6× energy reduction when total l6KB on-chip memory is used, while virtually on par with iso-accuracy of the baseline models (on average 0.36% degradation).
items.abstract_zh: 作为其核心计算，自注意力机制衡量整个输入序列的成对相关性。尽管性能良好，但计算成对相关性的成本却非常高。虽然最近的工作表明了对注意力分数较低的元素进行运行时修剪的好处，但自注意力机制的二次复杂性及其片上内存容量需求却被忽视了。这项工作通过构建一个名为 SPRINT<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup> 的加速器来解决这些限制，该加速器利用 ReRAM 交叉阵列固有的并行性以近似方式计算注意力分数。我们的设计使用 ReRAM 中的轻量级模拟阈值电路来修剪低注意力分数，使 SPRINT 能够仅将一小部分相关数据提取到片上存储器。为了减轻对模型准确性的潜在负面影响，SPRINT 重新计算了少数获取的数字数据的注意力分数。内存中剪枝和相关注意力分数的片上重新计算相结合，使 SPRINT 能够将二次复杂度转变为线性复杂度。此外，即使在修剪之后，我们也能识别并利用相邻注意力操作之间的动态空间局部性，这消除了昂贵但冗余的数据获取。我们在各种最先进的变压器模型上评估我们提出的技术。平均而言，当使用总 16KB 片上内存时，SPRINT 可以实现 7.5 倍的加速和 19.6 倍的能耗降低，同时几乎与基线模型的等精度相当（平均下降 0.36%）。

items.title: Featherweight Soft Error Resilience for GPUs.
items.abstract: This paper presents Flame, a hardware/software co-designed resilience scheme for protecting GPUs against soft errors. For low-cost yet high-performance resilience, Flame uses acoustic sensors and idempotent processing for error detection and recovery, respectively. That is, Flame seeks to correct any sensor-detected errors by re-executing the idempotent region where they occurred. To achieve this, it is essential for each idempotent region to ensure the absence of errors before moving on to the next region. This is so-called soft error verification that takes sensors’ worst-case detection latency (WCDL) to verify each region finished. Rather than waiting for WCDL at each region end, which incurs too much performance overhead, Flame proposes WCDL-aware warp scheduling that can hide the error verification delay (i.e., WCDL) with GPU’s inherent massive warp-level parallelism. When a warp hits each idempotent region boundary, Flame deschedules the warp and switches to one of the other ready warps—as if the region boundary were a regular long-latency operation triggering the warp switching. By leveraging GPU’s inherent ability for the latency hiding, Flame can completely eliminate the verification delay without significant hardware modification. The experimental results demonstrate that the performance overhead of Flame is near zero, i.e., 0.6% on average for 34 GPU benchmark applications.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了 Flame，这是一种硬件/软件共同设计的弹性方案，用于保护 GPU 免受软错误的影响。为了实现低成本且高性能的恢复能力，Flame 使用声学传感器和幂等处理分别进行错误检测和恢复。也就是说，Flame 试图通过重新执行发生错误的幂等区域来纠正任何传感器检测到的错误。为了实现这一目标，每个幂等区域必须确保在进入下一个区域之前不存在错误。这就是所谓的软错误验证，它利用传感器的最坏情况检测延迟 (WCDL) 来验证每个区域是否已完成。 Flame提出了WCDL感知的warp调度，可以利用GPU固有的大规模warp级并行性来隐藏错误验证延迟（即WCDL），而不是在每个区域末端等待WCDL，这会带来太多的性能开销。当扭曲到达每个幂等区域边界时，Flame 会取消调度扭曲并切换到其他就绪扭曲之一 - 就好像区域边界是触发扭曲切换的常规长延迟操作一样。通过利用GPU固有的延迟隐藏能力，Flame可以完全消除验证延迟，而无需对硬件进行重大修改。实验结果表明，Flame 的性能开销接近于零，即 34 个 GPU 基准测试应用程序的平均性能开销为 0.6%。

items.title: OCOLOS: Online COde Layout OptimizationS.
items.abstract: The processor front-end has become an increasingly important bottleneck in recent years due to growing application code footprints, particularly in data centers. First-level instruction caches and branch prediction engines have not been able to keep up with this code growth, leading to more front-end stalls and lower Instructions Per Cycle (IPC). Profile-guided optimizations performed by compilers represent a promising approach, as they rearrange code to maximize instruction cache locality and branch prediction efficiency along a relatively small number of hot code paths. However, these optimizations require continuous profiling and rebuilding of applications to ensure that the code layout matches the collected profiles. If an application’s code is frequently updated, it becomes challenging to map profiling data from a previous version onto the latest version, leading to ignored profiling data and missed optimization opportunities.In this paper, we propose OCOLOS, the first online code layout optimization system for unmodified applications written in unmanaged languages. OCOLOS allows profile-guided optimization to be performed on a running process, instead of being performed offline and requiring the application to be re-launched. By running online, profile data is always relevant to the current execution and always maps perfectly to the running code. OCOLOS demonstrates how to achieve robust online code replacement in complex multithreaded applications like MySQL and MongoDB, without requiring any application changes. Our experiments show that OCOLOS can accelerate MySQL by up to $1.41 \times $, the Verilator hardware simulator by up to $2.20 \times $, and a build of the Clang compiler by up to $1.14 \times $.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，由于应用程序代码占用量不断增加，特别是在数据中心中，处理器前端已成为越来越重要的瓶颈。一级指令缓存和分支预测引擎无法跟上代码的增长，导致更多的前端停顿和更低的每周期指令 (IPC)。编译器执行的配置文件引导优化代表了一种有前途的方法，因为它们重新排列代码以沿着相对较少数量的热代码路径最大化指令缓存局部性和分支预测效率。然而，这些优化需要对应用程序进行持续的分析和重建，以确保代码布局与收集的配置文件相匹配。如果应用程序的代码经常更新，那么将以前版本的分析数据映射到最新版本就变得很困难，从而导致分析数据被忽略并错过优化机会。在本文中，我们提出了 OCOLOS，这是第一个针对以非托管语言编写的未修改应用程序的在线代码布局优化系统。 OCOLOS 允许在正在运行的进程上执行配置文件引导的优化，而不是离线执行并需要重新启动应用程序。通过在线运行，配置文件数据始终与当前执行相关，并且始终完美地映射到正在运行的代码。 OCOLOS 演示了如何在 MySQL 和 MongoDB 等复杂的多线程应用程序中实现强大的在线代码替换，而不需要任何应用程序更改。我们的实验表明，OCOLOS 可以将 MySQL 加速高达 1.41 美元 × 美元，将 Verilator 硬件模拟器加速高达 2.20 美元 × 美元，将 Clang 编译器的构建加速高达 1.14 美元 × 美元。

items.title: ALTOCUMULUS: Scalable Scheduling for Nanosecond-Scale Remote Procedure Calls.
items.abstract: Online services in modern datacenters use Remote Procedure Calls (RPCs) to communicate between different software layers. Despite RPCs using just a few small functions, inefficient RPC handling can cause delays to propagate across the system and degrade end-to-end performance. Prior work has reduced RPC processing time to less than 1 $\mu$ s, which now shifts the bottleneck to the scheduling of RPCs. Existing RPC schedulers suffer from either high overheads, inability to effectively utilize high core-count CPUs or do not adaptively fit different traffic patterns. To address these shortcomings, we present ALTOCUMULUS,<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup> a scalable, software-hardware codesign to schedule RPCs at nanosecond scales. ALTOCUMULUS provides a proactive scheduling scheme and low-overhead messaging mechanism on top of a decentralized user runtime. ALTOCUMULUS also offers direct access from the user space to a set of simple hardware primitives to quickly migrate long-latency RPCs. We evaluate ALTOCUMULUS with synthetic workloads and an end-to-end in-memory key-value store application under real-world traffic patterns. ALTOCUMULUS improves throughput by 1.3-24.6$\times$ under a 99<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">th</sup> percentile latency <300$\mu$ s and reduces tail latency by up to 15.8$\times$ on 16-core systems over current state-of-the-art software and hardware schedulers. For 256-core systems, integrating ALTOCUMULUS with either a hardware-optimized NIC or commodity PCIe NIC can improve throughput by $ 2.8\times$ or $ 2.7\times$, respectively, under 99<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">th</sup> percentile latency $\lt 8.5\mu \mathrm{s}$.<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>Automatic Concurrent Migration Load-balancing Strategy (AutoCuMuLuS), homophonic with “altocumulus” as a type of clouds in meteorology, fragmented to separate patches or nodes.
items.abstract_zh: 现代数据中心中的在线服务使用远程过程调用 (RPC) 在不同软件层之间进行通信。尽管 RPC 仅使用一些小功能，但低效的 RPC 处理可能会导致延迟在整个系统中传播并降低端到端性能。之前的工作已将 RPC 处理时间减少到不到 1 $\mu$ s，现在将瓶颈转移到 RPC 的调度上。现有的 RPC 调度程序要么开销高，要么无法有效利用高核心数 CPU，要么无法自适应地适应不同的流量模式。为了解决这些缺点，我们提出了 ALTOCUMULUS，<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup> 一种可扩展的软硬件协同设计，用于以纳秒级调度 RPC。 ALTOCUMULUS 在分散的用户运行时之上提供主动调度方案和低开销消息传递机制。 ALTOCUMULUS 还提供从用户空间到一组简单硬件原语的直接访问，以快速迁移长延迟 RPC。我们在真实流量模式下使用合成工作负载和端到端内存中键值存储应用程序来评估 ALTOCUMULUS。 ALTOCUMULUS 在 99<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">th</sup> 百分位数延迟 <300$\mu$ 秒下将吞吐量提高了 1.3-24.6$\times$，并将尾部延迟减少高达与当前最先进的软件和硬件调度程序相比，16 核系统的成本为 15.8$\times$。对于 256 核系统，将 ALTOCUMULUS 与硬件优化的 NIC 或商用 PCIe NIC 集成可以在 99<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" 下分别将吞吐量提高 $ 2.8\times$ 或 $ 2.7\times$ xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">th</sup> 百分位延迟 $\lt 8.5\mu \mathrm{s}$。<sup xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">1</sup>自动并发迁移负载平衡策略（AutoCuMuLuS），与“高积云”谐音，是气象学中的一种云，碎片化为单独的斑块或节点。

items.title: ASSASIN: Architecture Support for Stream Computing to Accelerate Computational Storage.
items.abstract: Computational storage adds computing to storage devices, providing potential benefits in offload, data-reduction, and lower energy. Successful computational SSD architectures should match growing flash bandwidth, which in turn requires high SSD DRAM memory bandwidth. This creates a memory wall scaling problem, resulting from SSDs’ stringent power and cost constraints.A survey of recent computational SSD research shows that many computational storage offloads are suited to stream computing. To exploit this opportunity, we propose a novel general-purpose computational SSD and core architecture, called ASSASIN (Architecture Support for Stream computing to Accelerate computatIoNal Storage). ASSASIN provides a unified set of compute engines between SSD DRAM and the flash array. This eliminates the SSD DRAM bottleneck by enabling direct computing on flash data streams. ASSASIN further employs a crossbar to achieve performance even when flash data layout is uneven and preserve independence for page layout decisions in the flash translation layer. With stream buffers and scratchpad memories, ASSASIN core’s memory hierarchy and instruction set extensions provide superior low-latency access at low-power and effectively keep streaming flash data out of the in-SSD cache-DRAM memory hierarchy, thereby solving the memory wall.Evaluation shows that ASSASIN delivers 1.5x - 2.4x speedup for offloaded functions compared to state-of-the-art computational SSD architectures. Further, ASSASIN’s streaming approach yields 2.0x power efficiency and 3.2x area efficiency improvement. And these performance benefits at the level of computational SSDs translate to 1.1x - 1.5x end-to-end speedups on data analytics workloads.
items.abstract_zh: 计算存储为存储设备增加了计算能力，在卸载、数据减少和降低能耗方面提供了潜在的好处。成功的计算 SSD 架构应该与不断增长的闪存带宽相匹配，这反过来又需要高 SSD DRAM 内存带宽。由于 SSD 严格的功耗和成本限制，这就产生了内存墙扩展问题。对最近计算 SSD 研究的调查表明，许多计算存储卸载都适合流计算。为了利用这个机会，我们提出了一种新颖的通用计算 SSD 和核心架构，称为 ASSASIN（流计算加速计算存储的架构支持）。 ASSASIN 在 SSD DRAM 和闪存阵列之间提供了一套统一的计算引擎。通过在闪存数据流上实现直接计算，消除了 SSD DRAM 瓶颈。 ASSASIN 进一步采用交叉开关，即使在闪存数据布局不均匀的情况下也能实现性能，并保持闪存转换层中页面布局决策的独立性。借助流缓冲区和暂存器存储器，ASSASIN 核心的内存层次结构和指令集扩展可在低功耗下提供卓越的低延迟访问，并有效地将流式闪存数据排除在 SSD 缓存-DRAM 内存层次结构之外，从而解决内存墙问题。评估表明，与最先进的计算 SSD 架构相比，ASSASIN 可为卸载功能提供 1.5 至 2.4 倍的加速。此外，ASSASIN 的流式传输方法可将功率效率提高 2.0 倍，并将面积效率提高 3.2 倍。计算 SSD 级别的这些性能优势可转化为数据分析工作负载的 1.1 至 1.5 倍端到端加速。
